title: Senior Web Developer
description:
Job Description





The Ad Firm is a Digital Marketing Agency based in Southern California, serving clients nationwide. Since 2009, we’ve helped businesses grow through SEO, content, and performance-driven digital strategies.



We’re expanding our team and looking for a Senior Web Developer to lead how our websites are built from the ground up. This is not a production role. This is a systems-level engineering role for someone who understands that websites are not just design deliverables, they are performance assets that need to rank, scale, and hold up under real-world conditions.



This is a remote position with flexible working hours from day one.





About the Role



Own the technical foundation of the websites we build

Architect, develop, and optimize custom builds for SEO, performance, and scalability

Work closely with SEO, Content, and Digital PR teams to ensure strong technical execution

Build systems that are clean, scalable, and maintainable

Focus on engineering quality over page builders or pre-built themes



Key Responsibilities



Architect and build fully custom WordPress websites (themes, plugins, ACF-driven structures)

Engineer sites for speed, scalability, and strong Core Web Vitals performance

Handle server environments, deployments, and infrastructure decisions

Integrate APIs and third-party systems cleanly and reliably

Own technical SEO implementation (crawlability, indexation, structured data)

Manage DNS, CDN (Cloudflare), SMTP, and hosting configurations

Work across Shopify and BigCommerce at the code level when needed

Implement accurate tracking (GA4, GTM) without compromising data integrity

Debug issues across the full stack (server, backend, frontend performance)



What We’re Looking For



5+ years of web development experience in agency or performance-driven environments

Deep expertise in PHP (including WordPress core-level development)

Strong JavaScript experience with modern frameworks and tooling

Working knowledge of Python (automation, scraping, tooling)

Proven experience building custom WordPress websites from scratch

Strong understanding of technical SEO and its impact on architecture and performance

Ability to diagnose and solve full-stack issues independently



What Sets You Apart



You think in systems, not pages

Experience working on large-scale or SEO-heavy websites

Strong understanding of crawlability, indexation, and internal linking at scale

Experience with schema and structured data implementation

Exposure to programmatic SEO or dynamic page generation

Experience handling real-world constraints (traffic spikes, broken deployments, legacy rebuilds)



Strong Advantages



Experience with CI/CD pipelines and Git workflows

Familiarity with Docker or modern dev environments

Experience with log analysis and advanced debugging

Security hardening and site recovery experience

Experience with multi-site or multi-location SEO builds



What We Don’t Want



Heavy reliance on page builders

Plugin-first approaches to performance and SEO

Developers who need constant direction or step-by-step instructions



Why Join Us?



High ownership with real technical decision-making

Clean builds with no unnecessary bloat

Direct collaboration with SEO, Content, and Digital PR specialists

A team that values performance, scalability, and engineering quality

Competitive salary and performance-based incentives

Flexible remote work from day one

2 weeks Paid Time-Off

Paid Sick Leave

8 Paid Holidays

Health Insurance



Ready to Apply?



Submit your resume

Include a portfolio with examples of custom builds

Add a short note on how you approach building high-performance websites



How to Apply:



We do not monitor
s on this website. Submit your application at 
= to be considered for this position.

title: Talent Sourcer & Recruitment Operations Specialist (Hebrew Market)

Mission Statement

As a Talent Sourcer & Operations Specialist, you will be the engine of our "Recruitment Factory." You will be responsible for identifying high-quality Israeli talent, initiating contact, and performing a rigorous "Semi-Human / Semi-Automatic" screening process using advanced AI tools. Your goal is to deliver "ready-to-interview" leads to our Israeli recruiting team.



Key Responsibilities (The Workflow)

Advanced Sourcing: Execute complex Boolean searches and X-ray searches on LinkedIn Recruiter and our internal database of 270k resumes.



Data Intelligence: Build and manage LinkedIn Projects. Use tools like Improver to extract personal contact details 
s/phone numbers).



Multi-Channel Outreach:



Send initial contact
s to potential candidates.



Manage LinkedIn follow-ups (The 24/48-hour rule) to ensure maximum engagement.



Execute massive WhatsApp outreach using predefined Hebrew templates.



AI-Powered Screening (The "Semi-Human" Process):



Analyze candidate CVs against job requirements.



Use Gemini/ChatGPT to generate specific, professional screening questions in Hebrew to verify candidate suitability.



Manage candidate responses through translation tools (DeepL/ChatGPT) to categorize them as "Hot Leads" or "Not Relevant."



Lead Handoff: Ensure the CRM (ATS) is updated in real-time. Prepare a "Candidate Snapshot" for the Israeli recruiter, highlighting why the candidate is a match and their answers to the AI-generated screening questions.



Technical Requirements

LinkedIn Expertise: 2+ years of experience with LinkedIn Recruiter (Building projects, InMail, Sourcing).



CRM/ATS Management: Proven experience working with recruitment systems (Data entry and pipeline management).



AI Proficiency: Experience using ChatGPT/Gemini for data analysis or content generation.



Tools: Mastery of Google Workspace, DeepL/Translation tools, and browser extensions (like Improver, Apollo, etc.).



Qualifications & Skills

Exceptional English: Native or near-native written English (C1/C2 level) is mandatory.



Attention to Detail: Extreme precision is required when managing Hebrew templates and translations.



Analytical Mindset: Ability to read between the lines of a CV and identify key professional milestones.



Multi-tasking: Ability to manage dozens of conversations and sourcing tasks simultaneously without compromising quality.



Proactive Follow-up: A "hunter" mentality to follow up with candidates until a response is received.

title: Video Clipper and Editor — 60,000 PHP/Month
description:
BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

- Schedule: Monday to Friday, 8 AM – 5 PM (Philippine Time)

- 60,000 PHP/month after the first month + performance-based bonuses

- 40,000 PHP during the first (test) month

- Paid every two weeks via Wise

- Fully remote position

- Young, supportive team

- Clear growth path with opportunities to expand your role



ROLE OVERVIEW



You will extract short, high-value clips from a YouTube channel.



Your main responsibility is to:



- Watch long-form YouTube videos

- Deeply understand our target audience (pain points, goals, objections)

- Identify valuable, engaging, and on-brand 
nts

- Select clips that align with our short-form SOPs

- Turn them into 15–45 second Instagram Reels

- Add clean and accurate subtitles

- Ensure smooth audio

- Deliver 2–3 clips per day



You are not creating content from scratch.

You are selecting and packaging the best parts — strategically.



TASKS



- Clip 2–3 short videos per day (15–45 seconds each)

- Follow our short-form SOPs consistently

- Select clips based on audience relevance and brand alignment

- Clearly explain your thought process when submitting clips:

- Ensure subtitles are accurate and easy to understand

- Ensure a smooth audio experience

- Review your work carefully before submitting



Note: There may be additional small tasks as needed.



REQUIREMENTS



- Excellent English skills (C1 or above)

- Strong understanding of audience psychology and content-market fit

- Ability to follow and execute based on SOPs

- Previous experience in short-form editing or video clipping

- Strong judgment for identifying valuable, on-brand content

- Detail-oriented with critical thinking skills

- Ability to work independently while staying communicative

- Efficient and solution-focused mindset



HOW TO APPLY



ROUND 1: Fill in the application form and record a Loom introducing yourself:




/to/v0OA9cFs



Important note: Put “VC” + [Your Name & Family Name] in the “Name” field.



ROUND 2: Paid test task. You will receive long-form videos and create short clips in the same style.



MORE ABOUT US



Young Publisher:

title: Property Management Virtual Assistant
description:
Serviont is a premium estate management company serving high-net-worth homeowners and property management companies in Utah, USA. We consolidate every service a property needs — cleaning, landscaping, pool and spa care, pest control, painting, snow removal, and full estate management — into a single point of contact. Our clients make one call, and everything gets handled.



We're looking for a Property Management Virtual Assistant with experience in the property management or real estate space. You'll support day-to-day operations, handle vendor outreach and applications, manage client communication, and help grow the business — all remotely. If you've worked for a property management company, HOA, or real estate firm before, we want to hear from you.



What you'll do:



Answer and respond to inbound calls and
s professionally

Apply to vendor lists for property management companies and HOAs on behalf of Serviont

Outreach to property managers, realtors, builders, and HOAs to establish vendor relationships

Manage CRM, scheduling, follow-ups, and administrative tasks

Send proactive updates to the founder without being asked



Who you are:



Experience in property management, real estate, or a related field — this is a strong plus

Highly organized and self-directed — you execute without constant direction

Excellent written and spoken English

Motivated by performance and commission upside

Comfortable in a fast-moving, early-stage company

Proficient with Notion, Google Workspace, or similar tools

title: Operations & Growth Manager (OGM)
description:
Operations & Growth Manager (OGM)

(Part-Time, Remote – Australian Business Hours)



Are you someone who naturally brings order to chaos and takes the lead?

Do you thrive in fast-moving environments where things change daily, and your ability to stay organised, think ahead, and keep everything running smoothly actually matters?

We’re looking for a highly capable Operations and Growth Manager (OGM) to support a growing home services cleaning business based in Victoria, Australia.

This is not a typical “VA” role.

This is an opportunity to step into a key operational position within the business for the long-term, starting part-time (20 hours per week), with a clear pathway to full-time as the business continues to grow and can justify a full-time position.

________________________________________



About the Role

This role sits at the centre of the business operations.

Upon starting, your focus will be on learning and managing our job management system (ServiceM8), supporting job scheduling, coordinating workflows, and ensuring nothing falls through the cracks.

Over time, the role will evolve into a broader operational and growth support position, where you will contribute to improving systems, supporting customer workflows, and assisting with business development activities such as lead generation.

You will work closely with the business owner and play a critical role in helping the business scale and also maintain excellent customer service and delivery.

________________________________________



Key Responsibilities

Operations & Job Management (Primary Focus)

• Learn and manage ServiceM8 (job scheduling and workflow management). 

• Coordinate daily job schedules and ensure efficient allocation of work. 

• Monitor job progress and ensure tasks are completed on time. 

• Adjust schedules dynamically as priorities shift. 

• Maintain clean, accurate and up-to-date job data. 

________________________________________

CRM & Workflow Management

• Manage and maintain our CRM system (Salesforce). 

• Track leads, jobs, employees, and customer interactions. 

• Support pipeline visibility and follow-up processes.

• Ensure no leads or opportunities are missed. 

________________________________________

Customer Communication (Non-Phone Initially)

• Manage inboxes and respond to customer enquiries via
 and messaging. 

• Handle follow-ups, confirmations, and basic coordination. 

• Maintain a high standard of written communication and professionalism. 

________________________________________

Process Improvement & Admin Support

• Identify inefficiencies and help streamline workflows. 

• Support the creation and documentation of SOPs. 

• Assist with general operational and administrative tasks as required. 

________________________________________

Growth Support (Introduced Over Time)

• Assist with lead generation and tracking activities. 

• Support and drive business development initiatives as the role evolves. 

________________________________________



About You

You are not just organised, you are operationally sharp and treat the business like it’s your own.

You are dynamic in the way you think and operate – you have strong attention to detail and doing things right, and you also have the ability to be creative, innovative and agile. 

You take ownership, communicate clearly, and naturally stay one step ahead.

You are comfortable working in an environment where priorities can shift, and you can adapt quickly without losing structure, and can wear multiple hats.

You are not a typical ‘task taker,’ you think ahead and take initiative because you truly care about the success of the business, and not just ‘getting paid.’

You genuinely value growth, integrity, learning and thinking of ways to have a greater impact in all that you do.

You MUST have your own safe, private and dedicated working environment with a dedicated computer, strong internet, phone, and power infrastructure to ensure punctuality and reliability.

________________________________________



Experience & Skills

• Minimum of 4 years of experience working with CRM systems (e.g. Salesforce, Go High Level, HubSpot or similar) is essential. 

• Minimum 2 years of experience with job management or scheduling systems (e.g. ServiceM8 or similar) is highly regarded, but not required.

• Marketing and business development experience is highly regarded.

• Strong written English and communication skills.

• High attention to detail and accuracy. 

• Strong organisational and time management skills. 

• Tech-savvy with the ability to learn new systems quickly. 

________________________________________



Personal Attributes

• Proactive and takes initiative 

• Highly responsive and reliable 

• Able to prioritise and stay calm under pressure 

• Strong sense of accountability and integrity 

• Adaptable and comfortable in a fast-moving environment 

• Punctual and consistent in communication and delivery 

________________________________________



What’s on Offer

• Part-time role: 20 hours per week (4 hours per day, Monday–Friday). 

• Remote position (must be available during Australian business hours). 

• Clear pathway to full-time as the business grows. 

• Opportunity to step into a key operational role within a growing business. 

• Work directly with the business owner and contribute to real growth outcomes. 

________________________________________



How to Apply

Please submit:

• Your CV 

• A short summary outlining your experience with CRM systems and any scheduling/job management tools and anything else you deem relevant. 

• Briefly explain how you typically stay organised in a fast-paced environment and what sets you apart from other candidates. Please ensure your summary is written by you tailored to this role. Do NOT provide an AI generated response (I can tell). 



Important note: 

Please ONLY apply if you are open to growing into a full-time role over time and are looking for a long-term position within one business only. Further, a lack of punctuality, integrity, professionalism, strong communication with the client will not be tolerated. Please only apply for this role if you think you would be in your natural environment and it strongly aligns with your CV. If this role feels like a ‘stretch’ for you and doesn’t align with your skillset or experience, please do not apply.

title: Tech Operations and Automation Manager ($1,500–$2,000/month)
description:
Start rate: $1,500–$2,000 per month (based on experience)

Paid once per month via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company.

We work with content creators and online brands.



If you’re someone who wants to take full ownership and build systems that scale, this role is for you!



BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours per week (Flexible hours)

- Long-term stability: Not a short-term freelance contract.

- Stable monthly income: On-time payments via Wise

- Growth path: Opportunity to take full ownership of our tech stack

- High impact: Your systems directly affect revenue, retention, and team efficiency

- Supportive environment: No micromanagement, high ownership culture

- Tools provided: We cover the software you need



YOUR IMPACT



Your work reduces manual admin work.

Your systems improve onboarding and fulfillment speed.

Your dashboards increase visibility into performance metrics.

Your automations help the company scale cleanly.

You do not just build workflows.

You build infrastructure.



TASKS



Systems & Automation

- Build and manage advanced Airtable systems (multi-table databases, linked records, dashboards, KPIs)

- Create and maintain automations using 
, Zapier, and n8n

- Set up Slack automations (channel creation, alerts, routing, reminders, triggers)

- Connect tools across the company (CRM, forms, surveys, Slack, Airtable, Kajabi)

- Monitor automations daily and proactively fix issues

- Reduce manual processes across departments

- Kajabi & Fulfillment Support

- Manage Kajabi automations (onboarding flows, tagging, access control,
 triggers)

- Automate client onboarding (intake - Slack access - CRM tracking - milestone tracking)

- Improve fulfillment systems with dashboards, alerts, and progress tracking

- Build reporting for activation, retention, churn, revenue, and team performance



Architecture & Optimization

- Suggest better system structures as we grow

- Document all workflows clearly

- Build scalable foundations instead of temporary fixes

- Own and protect our automation infrastructure



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)



- C1+ English (written and spoken)

- Advanced Airtable experience

- Advanced 
 experience

- Experience with Slack automations and integrations

- Experience with Zapier

- Strong understanding of APIs and webhooks

- Strong systems thinking (you think in architecture, not tasks)

- Ability to translate business problems into technical solutions

- Proactive mindset and high ownership

- Reliable internet and quiet workspace



STRONG PLUS



- n8n experience

- Kajabi automation experience

- CRM integrations (Close is a plus)

- Experience building KPI dashboards

- Experience supporting onboarding and fulfillment workflows

- Experience in fast-growing online businesses

- Experience with 7–9 figure digital brands



WHY JOIN US?



- $1,500–$2,000 per month based on experience

- Long-term stability

- High ownership role

- Direct impact on company growth

- Clear opportunity to become Head of Systems / Automation Lead

- Work with a fast-moving digital company

- All tools and software covered



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with “TECH OPS” as the message title

2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV

#2: Your years of experience with Airtable

#3: Your years of experience with 

#4: Your experience with n8n (if any)

#5: A short description of the most advanced system you have built

#6: One sentence on why you are a strong fit for this role



Note: Messages that do not follow this format will NOT be reviewed.



We look forward to building scalable systems with you.



P.S. Recruitment is managed by Young Publisher. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: GoHighLevel Specialist
description:
***At Polaris, we’re on the lookout for a driven, detail-oriented, and marketing-savvy Marketing and Acquisitions Assistant to join our world-class team. If you thrive in fast-paced environments, love the idea of being the operational backbone of a company’s marketing engine, and have strong hands-on experience with GoHighLevel, content creation, CRM systems, and social media, this role is for you.



***About us:

Polaris is a consulting agency with a bold mission: To help 1 million Founders to leverage time, reclaim freedom, and scale without sacrifice. We’re the only firm blending coaching and done-for-you services through a hybrid model — empowering our clients with strategic delegation, streamlined operations, and scalable systems. 



***Who we are looking for:

We’re looking for a proactive implementer and critical thinker — someone who can own the execution of digital marketing systems from A to Z. You’ll be the strong link the Founder can rely on, responsible for setting up, executing, and optimizing all marketing touchpoints across CRM, content, social media, funnels, ads, and lead follow-up. This role is perfect for someone who thrives in supporting visionaries, brings technical marketing skills to the table, and gets excited about driving results behind the scenes.



***Your mission:

Be the driving force behind the marketing engine of an established, fast-growing company. You won’t just support growth — you’ll architect it. By managing the daily execution of CRM, funnels, social media, and content systems, your role will directly help scale client acquisition, multiply impact, and buy back the Founder’s time.



***Role Responsibilities

Set up and manage GHL sub-accounts, funnels, workflows, and
 campaigns

Edit and repurpose content (Canva, CapCut, Descript)

Manage FB, IG, and LinkedIn content + engagement

Track metrics: CPL, CTR, conversions, UTM, Pixel, GA

Handle outreach, DMs, follow-ups, and pipeline management



***Requirements

3+ years virtual work experience

Strong English communication

Proven GoHighLevel experience (agency-level preferred)

Skilled in graphic/video editing

Social media management experience

Strong attention to detail, systems thinking, and project management



***Schedule & Compensation

Full-time, Monday–Friday

Timezone depends on role (NA, EU, AUS/APAC)

Starting at $5/hr, with bonuses, training, growth, and WFH perks



***How to Apply

Submit your application here:





Please do NOT private message us regarding this job. We have a hiring process in place and will only accept applicants who can follow the process.



Place the word "I am" at the start of your full name in the application form.

title: Virtual Assistant (No Graveyard Shift!)
description:
About the Role:

We’re seeking a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant with experience in basic lead scraping and data entry. Join our fast-growing team and contribute to a company that truly values your work and dedication!



Schedule:

5–7 days per week (you choose your preferred number of workdays)

8 hours per day



Work Hours:

Daytime hours in the Philippines

No graveyard shifts or U.S. time zone work



Compensation and Perks:

Competitive starting salary: USD $160–$190/month

Daily bonuses and frequent opportunities for raises (performance competitions, incentives, etc.)

On-time payments via PayPal

Growth opportunities into higher-level roles for top performers

Supportive and positive team environment



Additional Benefits:

Free access to professional training on personal growth, health, and mindset development

Build a stable career in a well-established 6-year-old, 8-figure company



If you’re motivated, dependable, and ready to grow with us, we’d love to have you on our team!

Apply now and take the first step toward an exciting future.



Salary:

USD $160–$190/month (plus daily bonuses and pay raises for consistent top performance)

title: Real Estate Lead Manager (Remote)
description:
???? Hiring: Experienced Real Estate Lead Manager (Remote)



We’re looking for a highly motivated and experienced Lead Manager to join our growing real estate investment team.



This role is ideal for someone who already understands real estate lead management, follow-ups, and CRM systems and is ready to start immediately.



???? Compensation:

• $4.50/hour starting rate

• Commission on every closed deal from the leads you pass off

• Bonus for qualified pass-offs

• Long-term opportunity with a growing team



???? Start Date: ASAP

???? Remote Position



Responsibilities



• Manage and follow up with seller leads

• Qualify leads and pass motivated sellers to the acquisitions team

• Update and maintain CRM (REsimpli or similar)

• Track lead status and maintain organized pipelines

• Coordinate with the acquisitions team for appointments and offers



Requirements



? Previous experience as a Real Estate Lead Manager or VA

? Strong English communication skills (phone and written)

? Experience with CRM systems (REsimpli, Podio, Salesforce, etc.)

? Ability to build rapport with sellers and identify motivation

? Reliable computer, headset, and stable internet



?? Important:

We are looking for someone who is serious about work and ready to contribute immediately. If you’re not committed to the role or the application process, please respect everyone’s time.



???? How to Apply



Fill out this form to start your application:





We are looking to hire immediately, so please apply only if you are ready to start ASAP.

title: Assistant Content Strategist
description:
Work alongside a creative/content strategist shaping one of the fastest-growing consumer brands online.



We’re NOT looking for an ad expert or a marketing veteran.



We’re looking for someone who understands people.



If you’ve ever caught yourself analyzing why people buy, what they fear, or what makes them feel seen... you already think like a strategist.



If you notice emotions in TikTok videos more than filters, or you can sense when a line hits differently, this is for you.



Your role:



- Study human behavior and translate emotion into persuasive ad scripts.

- Break down what makes people stop scrolling, the pain, the hope, the “aha” 
nt

- Research trends and conversations that reveal what people truly care about

- Work directly with a creative strategist to turn insights into stories that sell





Who you are: 



- A curious, observant thinker who loves psychology, storytelling, and social media

- A fresh graduate eager to learn how emotion drives attention and sales

- Excited to be mentored in creative strategy, not just to make content, but to make people feel





Growth opportunities:



You’ll start by assisting in research and scripting, but as you grow, you’ll take on full creative briefs, lead concept development, and shape ad directions for future campaigns.



The right person will evolve into a full-fledged Creative Strategist.



This isn’t a typical assistant role, it’s an apprenticeship in human-driven creative strategy, learning how to transform emotion into performance and ideas into impact.





???? Apply if you’re obsessed with understanding why people buy, click, and care....and you’re hungry to grow into a creative strategist yourself.





To apply:

 Don’t send a generic cover letter. Instead, share one ad, video, or piece of content that made you stop scrolling and tell me, in two sentences, why it caught your attention.



Bonus (optional):



Write one short opening line you think could start a TikTok or Reel for an IPL hair removal handset.

It could make people curious, surprised, or emotionally connected, anything that would make you stop scrolling.

title: Executive assistant
description:
Summary

Virtual Assistant / Virtual Receptionist + Operations Support

We are looking for a highly organized, proactive, and professional Virtual Assistant who can also function as a virtual receptionist and day-to-day operations support for our busy, high-end clinic.

We are an established medical spa with a fast-paced environment, multiple providers, and a strong focus on client experience, accountability, and smooth internal operations. We need someone who can help keep the clinic organized behind the scenes, support front-end administrative tasks, and ensure important tasks are being followed through properly.



Role Overview

This is not a basic admin role. We are looking for someone who can help manage daily operations, support reception tasks virtually, and audit team performance to ensure nothing is being missed.

This role requires real-time availability and active presence during working hours.



Schedule & Requirements

Must be available during Mountain Standard Time (MST) clinic hours

Must be logged into Zoom and available on camera/active communication while working

Starting as a part-time role with transition into full-time for the right candidate

Must be responsive, present, and engaged throughout shift (this is not passive work)



Main Responsibilities

Virtual Reception / Client Support

Respond to client inquiries in a professional and timely manner

Manage
, SMS, and communication platforms

Assist with bookings, confirmations, rescheduling, and follow-ups

Monitor missed calls, voi
s, and ensure proper follow-up

Maintain a polished, high-end client communication standard



Operations Support

Oversee day-to-day administrative operations remotely

Track tasks and ensure completion by tea
mbers

Organize workflows, checklists, and internal systems

Identify inefficiencies or gaps in operations

Auditing + Accountability

Audit task completion across the team

Ensure staff are following required procedures and workflows

Verify notes, charting, follow-ups, and required actions are completed

Flag issues, inconsistencies, or missed responsibilities

Help create stronger accountability across the clinic

Systems + Administrative Support

Work within clinic systems (booking, communication, task management)

Organize internal documents, SOPs, and forms

Assist in updating templates, processes, and internal communication

Provide ongoing administrative support to management



What We’re Looking For

Strong administrative and organizational skills

Experience as a Virtual Assistant, Receptionist, or Operations Coordinator

Excellent written and verbal communication

High attention to detail and strong follow-up skills

Professional, polished, and calm communication style

Ability to manage multiple moving parts in a fast-paced environment

Discretion and professionalism with confidential information

Ability to be present, accountable, and engaged during working hours



Ideal Experience

Experience in a medical spa, clinic, beauty, or healthcare environment is a strong asset

Experience with scheduling systems, CRM tools, and communication platforms

Experience in auditing workflows, accountability tracking, or operations support



What Success Looks Like

Client communication is consistent, timely, and professional

Tasks are completed and not falling through the cracks

Tea
mbers are held accountable

Operations feel organized, structured, and efficient

Management has clear visibility on performance and issues



Growth Opportunity

This role has strong potential to grow into a full-time operations support position for the right candidate who proves reliability, consistency, and leadership.



To Apply

Please include:

Relevant experience

Experience in clinics/medical spa/service-based businesses (if applicable)

Systems/platforms you’ve worked with

Examples of operations or admin support

Your availability (MST) and fixed rate



111To confirm you have read this posting in full, please include the word “Accountability” at the top of your application.

title: Facebook pages clean-up & Meta Business Manager Setup
description:
Hi there,



I run a very small marketing and communications business in Melbourne, and I’m looking for a detail-oriented VA to help clean up and 
 my
 Page access and permissions.



Over time, I’
 been added to multiple
 Pages (clients, past projects, community groups), and it’s become messy and hard to manage.



I’d like to centralise everything into my Meta Business Manager and remove any unnecessary or outdated access.



What You’ll Be Doing:



1. Audit & Organisation



Review all
 Pages I currently have access to

Categorise pages into:

Active clients (keep)

Inactive / no longer needed (remove)

Personal/irrelevant



2. Meta Business Manager Setup



Move or connect active pages into my Business Manager

Ensure correct roles and permissions are set (admin/editor etc.)

Remove duplicate or confusing access (personal vs Business Manager)



3. Clean-Up & Access Removal



Remove me from pages that are no longer relevant

Where needed, assist in contacting page owners/admins with instructions



4. Simple Documentation



Create and maintain a Google Sheet tracking:

Page name

Status (active/inactive)

Access type

Actions taken



5. Risk Awareness



Make sure no pages lose admin access during changes

Flag anything unclear before making changes



Requirements:

Strong experience with
 Pages + Meta Business Manager

You understand page roles, permissions, and access levels

High attention to detail (this is clean-up work, not creative work)

Good written English (for occasional messages to page owners)

Comfortable working independently and asking questions when needed



Nice to Have (but not essential):

Experience managing multiple client accounts

Familiarity with agencies or social media workflows



Hours & Timeline:

Initial project: approx. 5–10 hours



How to Apply:



Please include:



A short summary of your experience with Meta Business Manager

An example of a similar task you’ve done (if any)

Your hourly rate in $AUD

The word “Ripple” at the top of your application so I know you’ve read this



Bonus (optional):



If you’ve ever cleaned up a messy Business Manager before, tell me what the biggest issue was and how you fixed it.



I look forward to receiving your submission or questions. 

Thanks,

Kate

Excellent written communication skills

Tech-savvy and able to navigate multiple platforms daily

Reliable internet connection and a computer



Start as soon as possible.

title: Intercom & Fin AI Specialist
description:
We're looking for an experienced Intercom specialist to help us fully set up and optimize our Intercom workspace, with a strong focus on Fin AI.



What we need help with:

- Setting up Intercom so it truly understands our business, our services, and our customer journey

- Training Fin AI to give accurate, on-brand answers when customers and leads chat with us

- Building out a complete knowledge base of help articles

- Structuring article categories, tags, and content so Fin can pull the right answers

- Setting up workflows, automations, inbox rules, and team inboxes

- Configuring lead qualification flows and handoffs to human agents

- Advising us on how to get the most out of Intercom and Fin (best practices, what features to use, what to avoid)

- Ongoing optimization based on Fin's performance and customer conversations



Who we're looking for:

- Proven experience setting up and managing Intercom (please share examples)

- Hands-on experience with Fin AI specifically, not just legacy Intercom chatbots

- Understanding of how to write and structure help content for AI retrieval

- Bonus: experience in healthcare or other regulated industries

- Strong written English

- Self-starter who can guide us, not just take orders



Details:

- Potential for ongoing part-time retainer work

- Remote, flexible hours

- Long-term opportunity for the right person



How to Apply:

Fill out this quick form: (Do not send
s or messages. Only applications through this form will be considered)





Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: Website Builder + Deployment VA (AI-Assisted, Long-Term Role)
description:
Hi! I run a small US-based web design and hosting company that builds simple, clean websites for local small businesses (restaurants, salons, contractors, etc.). I'm looking for one reliable person to join the team long-term and handle the full build + deploy process.



**What you'll do**

- Build small business websites using AI tools (Claude, Base44, Lovable, or similar — I'll show you the workflow)

- Deploy them to hosting (Vercel / Netlify / similar)

- Connect client domains (Cloudflare, GoDaddy, Namecheap DNS setup)

- Make small edits when clients request them



**About the work**

- Most sites take 45–90 minutes once you know the system

- You'll get client info from their existing website or Google Business Listing

- Some sites are "spec" (built before the client signs) and some are for confirmed paying clients

- Moderate volume — I do active sales outreach weekly



**Pay structure**

- **$10 per spec site built** (paid weekly)

- **$100 bonus per site that converts to a paying client**

- Potential monthly retainer down the line for ongoing support once we hit volume



Real math: if you build 20 spec sites a week and 2 convert, that's $200 + $200 = $400/week. The better the sites look, the higher the conversion, the more you earn.



**Who I'm looking for**

- Good written English

- Comfortable with AI tools 

- Reliable and communicative on WhatsApp

- Detail-oriented — typos and broken links kill conversions

- Available 4–6 hours/day, flexible on timing but some overlap with US evenings (PH morning/midday) preferred

- Long-term mindset — I don't want to re-hire in 3 months



**How to apply**

Message Include the word “Apple” in your subject response. Applications without this will not be reviewed.

1. A short message telling me why this role fits you

2. One example of a website you've built or deployed with AI 

3. Your available hours (PH time)



The first task will be a **paid trial build** — one real spec site, $20 flat, 24-hour turnaround. If it's good, we start working together ongoing.



Looking forward to hearing from you!

title: Content and Script Writer
description:
NOW HIRING



Australian DTC brand  | Full time · Remote  |  $800–$1,000/month USD | Philippines only



We are a fast-growing Australian direct-to-consumer oral care brand. We sell physical products online, run

paid social ads on Meta, and work with UGC creators to drive growth. Every decision we make is rooted in

data and real buyer psychology. We are a small, lean team — no politics, no fluff, just execution. The brand

name will be shared after the application stage.



THE ROLE:



This is not just a writing job. Anyone can write. What we need is someone who can think — research what

real people feel, identify what makes them buy, develop the right angles, and turn those into compelling video

ad scripts.



You'll work directly with the founder. He will teach you how we think about content, consumer psychology,

and what makes ads actually work. You execute, you learn, you grow.



WHAT YOU'LL ACTUALLY DO



1. Mine research — customer reviews, competitor ads, Reddit threads, TikTok comments — and

identify what real buyers actually feel and say

2. Develop 3–5 content angles per product and present them with your reasoning

3. Turn approved angles into detailed creative briefs

4. Write full video ad scripts — hook, body, CTA — ready to hand to creators

5. Iterate based on feedback until scripts are ready to shoot



HARD REQUIREMENTS:

Based in the Philippines. Excellent written English — this is non-negotiable. Your application, your

scripts, and your thinking must all be in clear, natural English. If your written English is not strong,

please do not apply.



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR

description:

Nushi Studio, a subsidiary of S Family Office,  is a creative agency specializing in crafting human-centric content. Our mission is to emphasize the creation of engaging and relatable content that resonates with a diverse audience. We are looking for a skilled 2D animator with experience in  software such as Clip Studio (or similar) with a passion for anime-style animation to join our creative team. You will be responsible for bringing characters to life through fluid, high-energy animations inspired by real-life dance trends and pop culture. Requirements:

Strong attention to detail and the ability to take direction and feedback.

Experience with motion graphics and effects.

Background in storyboarding or character design.

title: Remote Sales Specialist (Wholesale / B2B)
description:
Remote Sales Specialist



AM Eyewear - Global



AM Eyewear, Australia’s longest-running independent fashion eyewear brand, established in 2003, is expanding its global wholesale network.



We’re looking for a highly driven Remote Sales Specialist to initiate and convert new business across Europe, the USA and Asia, working directly with leading optical retailers. If you understand premium product, can sell with confidence, and know how to turn cold outreach into long-term accounts, this is a high-reward opportunity.



This is a commission-only role designed for serious sales operators who want uncapped earning potential within an established global brand.



What You’ll Be Doing



• Proactively reach out to optical stores via cold calling and
 outreach using our extensive global database

• Introduce and position AM Eyewear as a premium, must-have brand within high-end optical environments

• Convert new wholesale partners and onboard them to our B2B ordering platform

• Build and maintain relationships with store owners and buyers

• Identify high-value accounts and develop long-term opportunities

• Ensure a smooth first order experience and handover into our system for ongoing reorders

• Represent the brand with a strong understanding of luxury positioning, materials and design



Commission Structure



• 20% commission on all first orders

(Typical first orders range between USD $2,000 – $4,000)



• 10% commission on all reorders

(Generated through accounts you initiate, for 2 years)



• First orders are supported with a 30% wholesale discount, with an ongoing 20% margin for stockists, making conversion highly attractive



What We’re Looking For



• Proven experience in sales, business development or wholesale (fashion/optical preferred)

• Confidence in cold outreach - phone and

• Strong communication and persuasion skills

• Self-motivated and comfortable working remotely

• Ability to understand and sell premium/luxury product

• Organised, consistent and results-driven



About the Brand



AM Eyewear is a globally recognised eyewear brand, stocked in over 1,000 high-end optical practices worldwide.



We are known for:

• Handcrafted frames using Italian bio-based acetate and Japanese titanium

• Premium ZEISS nylon lenses with gold AR coating

• A design-led approach blending fashion, culture and craftsmanship



This is not a startup sell, you’ll be representing a brand with strong industry credibility and demand.



What You’ll Love



• High commission structure with uncapped earning potential

• Work remotely, on your own schedule

• Sell a product that already has global recognition and demand

• Long-term earning from accounts you build



How to Apply



Send your CV and a short introduction outlining your sales experience to:





Please note: this role is suited to experienced sales professionals. Only applicants with relevant experience will be considered.

title: Senior Google Ads + Microsoft Ads Builder (DFW Roofing – High Competition)
description:
DESCRIPTION:



I need a heavy-hitting Ads Specialist to build a complete inbound lead generation system for a roofing company in the Dallas–Fort Worth market.



This is a high-competition, high-CPC environment. I am not hiring beginners or generalists.



I need a proven operator who has already generated inbound calls for high-ticket service businesses (Roofing, HVAC, Solar, etc.) in major metro markets.



SCOPE OF WORK:



Structure:

Build a high-performance Google Ads Search campaign, then mirror it into Microsoft Ads (Bing).



Match Types:

Expert-level use of Exact and Phrase match. No wasted spend on broad junk.



Negatives:

Build and deploy a strong negative keyword list from Day 1.



Conversion Focus:

Campaign must be built for inbound calls and qualified leads, not just traffic.



Scheduling:

Ad scheduling must align strictly with live call-answering hours.



Tracking:

Full setup of call tracking and form tracking integrated into GoHighLevel (GHL).



Verification:

You will fully test and verify the lead flow before final handoff.



REQUIREMENTS:



Deep experience in high-CPC, competitive local service markets

Proven results with high-ticket services (roofing, HVAC, etc.)

Strong understanding of cost-per-lead control in competitive environments

Experience integrating directly with GHL

Ability to move from build to live launch quickly



ONGOING (OPTIONAL):



After the initial build, I am open to light weekly optimization:



performance review

negative keyword expansion

bid and budget adjustments



No long-term contract required.



HOW TO APPLY (MANDATORY FILTER):



Do not apply without proof.



To be considered, include:



Proof of Results:

Screenshots or data showing inbound calls/leads generated



Case Studies:

Brief examples from competitive local markets



Strategy (2 sentences max):

Explain how you prevent budget bleed in $20+ CPC environments

title: Google Ads Virtual Assistant (PPC) – Physiotherapy Clinic (Canada)
description:
We are a busy physiotherapy clinic based in Markham, Ontario, Canada looking for an experienced Google Ads Virtual Assistant to join our team on a part-time, long-term basis.



Our campaigns are already up and running but we want to take performance to the next level. This is a collaborative role — we will work closely together to audit and overhaul our existing campaigns, continuously improve performance, increase first-page search presence, grow search volume, and refine our bidding strategy to get the best possible return on our ad spend.



What You'll Be Doing:



Account Audit & Optimization:

- Conduct a full audit of all existing campaigns, ad groups, and ads

- Edit, restructure, pause, or delete underperforming campaigns and ads as needed

- Identify gaps in our current campaign structure and recommend improvements

- Ensure all campaigns are properly organized by service and target audience



Ongoing Campaign Management:

- Build new campaigns and ads for services not yet advertised

- Weekly monitoring and maintenance of all active campaigns

- Reviewing search terms reports and updating negative keyword lists regularly

- Research new high-intent keywords and search volume opportunities

- Monitor and adjust bids to maximize conversions and reduce cost per call

- A/B testing ad copy and landing pages to improve click-through and conversion rates

- Work with us to improve Quality Scores and first-page search rankings



Reporting & Communication:

- Provide a clear, simple weekly or bi-weekly performance report covering calls, cost per conversion, and key wins/issues

- Proactively flag anything that needs our input or decision-making

- Collaborate closely with us — this is a partnership, not a hands-off arrangement



What We're Looking For:

- Proven Google Ads experience — please share examples of campaigns you've managed

- Demonstrated ability to audit, restructure, and improve existing Google Ads accounts

- Experience writing ad copy that converts clicks into booked appointments

- Google Ads certification is a strong asset (please include your Skillshop certificate)

- Experience with local service businesses or healthcare is preferred

- Someone who takes initiative, communicates proactively, and treats this like their own business

- Strong written English and reliable availability during Canadian business hours (at least partially)

- Long-term mindset — we want to build a lasting working relationship with the right person



This is Not the Right Role if You:

- Are looking for a short-term or one-off project

- Need heavy supervision or step-by-step direction on basic tasks

- Don't have hands-on Google Ads experience including account audits and rebuilds

- Cannot write strong, professional ad copy in English



Hours & Compensation:

- Approximately 10–15 hours per week initially (for the audit and rebuild phase), settling to 5–10 hours per week for ongoing management

- Competitive monthly salary based on experience $6 - 10 / hour 

- Long-term position with opportunity to grow as the clinic grows



To Apply:

Please send a brief introduction about yourself, your Google Ads experience, any relevant certifications, and examples of campaigns you have managed — including any accounts you have audited, restructured, or rebuilt. Applicants who do not include this information will not be considered.

title: Cabinet Draftsman Designer
description:
Position Overview:

Grandeur Design Supply is seeking a detail-oriented Cabinet Draftsman Designer to join our team. This role involves developing accurate cabinet layouts using CAD software to design precise cabinetry and woodworking components.



- Please provide your portfolio with your best kitchen and countertop designs or samples -

- Conduct comprehensive cabinet and material take-offs to support project planning, and procurement.

- Assist with the preparation of job quotes and bidding process by interpreting specifications, selecting materials, and supporting pricing and estimating efforts

- Work closely with clients, sales representatives, and production teams to refine design concepts and ensure all drawings meet functional, aesthetic, and construction standards

- Ensure that all designs comply with company standards, space constraints, and project requirements

Requirements:

- Proficiency in CAD software (e.g., AutoCAD, Cabinet Vision, or similar) with the ability to produce clear and accurate cabinet layouts and part drawings

- Experience in cabinet design, woodworking, or custom millwork drafting (minimum 1–2 years preferred)

- Familiarity and an understanding of cabinet construction methods

- Ability to interpret architectural plans, elevations, and field measurements into functional cabinet designs

- Strong skills in material take-offs, layout optimization, and project documentation

- Excellent time management and organizational skills; capable of handling multiple design projects simultaneously

- Detail-oriented with a strong commitment to accuracy, quality control, and production efficiency

- Effective communicator and team player, able to collaborate with production teams, sales, and clients to ensure design intent and expectations are met



Compensation:

- Starts at $4/hr (could be higher depending on skills and experience)



Schedule:

- 8 hour shift

title: AI Automation Developer – Newo.ai / REST API / Prompt Engineering
description:
We are a fast-growing AI Automation Agency based in the US, serving home service businesses. We build and deploy AI-powered systems that help service businesses never miss a lead — think AI receptionists, automated follow-ups, review requests, and lead nurture workflows.

We are scaling fast. We need a sharp developer who can grow with us from the ground up.

This is a long-term, part-time role. If you perform well, your role and salary grows as the agency grows.



What You'll Be Building

You will work inside Newo.ai — a conversational AI platform — to build and maintain AI agents for our clients. 



Day-to-day, this means:

Building AI receptionist workflows and missed-call text-back automations

Setting up lead nurture sequences (SMS +
) triggered by client actions

Connecting Newo.ai to external tools via REST APIs (GoHighLevel, ServiceTitan, Housecall Pro, Jobber)

Writing and refining prompts for AI agents that handle real customer calls

Using Jinja2 templates to customize message flows per client

Managing Projects, Flows, and Skills inside the Newo platform

Monitoring logs and debugging live agent behavior in production

Versioning and maintaining stable production deployments



You will be trained on Newo Script Language (NSL) — this is proprietary, so no prior NSL experience is expected. What matters is that you learn fast and you are comfortable working in new environments.



You Are a Strong Fit If You Have:



Solid understanding of REST APIs and JSON — you can read API docs and build integrations without being hand-held

Prompt engineering experience — you have built or fine-tuned AI prompts that handle real-world conversations

Jinja2 templating for Python— you know how to use variables and conditionals inside templates

Familiarity with event-driven architecture — you understand triggers, webhooks, and async flows

Comfortable working in an IDE (VSCode or PyCharm)

Understanding of creating workflows in n8n.

Good written English — you will communicate with US-based clients0

Able to work during US business hours overlap (at least 4 hours overlap with PDT)





Nice to Have (Not Required):



Experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) and Twilio

Prior work with voice AI or conversational agents

Experience working with a marketing or automation agency





What We Offer:



$800–$1,800/mo USD depending on skill level — paid monthly via Wise or PayPal

Long-term position (we are not looking for project-by-project)

Paid company training and certification (Newo.ai Academy + Bootcamp — we cover the cost)

Salary increases tied to agency growth

Direct access to the agency owner — no corporate layers, fast decisions

Work from home, flexible schedule with US hours overlap





How to Apply

To show us you read this post, start your application message with the word: NEWO

Then tell us:



Your experience with REST APIs — give one specific example of an integration you built

Your experience with prompt engineering — what was it for and what platform?

Your monthly salary expectation (in USD)

Your available hours and timezone



Applications that do not follow this format will not be reviewed.

We are reviewing applications immediately and will move fast — first interviews happen within 24 hours of posting.

title: Experienced Sales Operator for YouTube Growth Agency (Appointment Setter / Closer Support)
description:
We are building a serious YouTube growth agency for authority creators, coaches, consultants, lawyers, finance experts, and other high-trust personal brands.



We are looking for a sales operator who understands how to:

- start real conversations

- qualify leads

- move people toward calls

- keep handoffs clean

- communicate like a professional



Our company helps expert-led brands grow through YouTube strategy, editing systems, thumbnails, SEO, workflow support, and backend growth infrastructure.



This role is for someone who can help turn:

- leads into conversations

- conversations into calls

- calls into paid audits and retained clients



### What You Will Do

- reach out to qualified leads with personalized messages

- follow up without sounding robotic or desperate

- qualify prospects based on fit, authority, and buyer intent

- help move leads toward booked calls

- keep sales updates organized in Slack or our tracking system

- hand off conversations clearly to the next owner

- protect the quality of the pipeline instead of chasing low-quality volume



### What We Want

- strong written English

- real experience in sales, appointment setting, lead qualification, or high-ticket outreach

- ability to write personalized messages instead of copy-paste spam

- confidence speaking with business owners, creators, consultants, and authority figures

- good judgment

- fast follow-through

- high accountability

- comfort working inside a system with clear handoff rules



### Strong Bonus If You Have

- experience with agencies

- experience booking calls for high-ticket services

- experience selling to creators, coaches, consultants, lawyers, or business owners

- experience with Slack, CRMs, or structured pipeline tracking



### What We Do Not Want

- generic VA applicants

- people who need constant chasing

- people who confuse activity with progress

- people who send weak outreach and blame the market

- people who are sloppy with follow-up or handoffs



### How We Measure Success

- reply quality

- qualified conversations started

- calls booked

- clean handoffs

- professionalism

- consistency



### Application Instructions

To apply, send:

1. A short intro about your sales experience

2. The types of offers or services you have sold before

3. One example of a personalized outreach message you would send to an expert or creator

4. Your expected hourly rate or compensation preference

5. The word `operator` in the first line of your application so we know you read carefully



### Screening Questions

1. What kind of sales work have you done before, and what results did you help produce?

2. How do you qualify whether a lead is worth pursuing?

3. Write a short outreach message to a lawyer or business coach with a YouTube channel that has expertise but weak packaging.

4. What do you do when a lead does not respond after the first message?

5. How do you keep handoffs clear so the next person can act fast?



### Suggested Internal Notes

- prioritize applicants with proof of real outreach quality

- reject generic applications fast

- test judgment, not just confidence

- if needed, start with a paid trial using a small lead list

Bonus: Experience with hospitality, tourism, or crowdfunding-style launches.



What We Offer

 which is rated #1 Boutique Inn in its market.

Only applicants with relevant Meta + MailChimp experience will be considered. We aim to respond to strong candidates quickly!

title: Construction Scheduler (Project Management)
description:
# Construction Scheduler - Job Specification



**Company:** Plaza Works

**Role:** Construction Scheduler

**Location:** Remote / Work from home

**Rate:** Up to $20 per hour

**Reports to:** Owner

**Growth path:** Contract to full-time position based on performance and workload



---



## Role Summary



The Construction Scheduler coordinates all trades, scheduling and resource management across 5-10 active bathroom renovation projects at any given time. This role does not communicate directly with customers. All customer-facing communication goes through the Customer Success Coordinator. The overarching goal is simple: once a job starts, finish it in the shortest possible time with the least possible disruption to the customer.



---



## Required Experience and Skills



- Previous experience scheduling or coordinating trades in a construction environment. Bathroom renovation experience is ideal.

- No licenses required. Practical knowledge of how renovation projects run, trade sequencing and common issues is essential.

- Comfortable using CRMs and job management systems (GHL, Fergus or similar).

- Ability to problem-solve quickly when schedules change (delays, sick days, supply issues, asbestos finds).

- Strong communication with trades and internal tea
mbers.



---



## Core Responsibilities



### Scheduling and Resource Management



- Schedule all trades across active jobs. Full-time trades must be fully booked at least 7 days in advance.

- If the schedule has gaps, flag it to sales/marketing immediately so they can find more work.

- Coordinate with the Customer Success Coordinator on customer availability for days when work is planned at their property, especially when the customer is living in the home.

- Ensure there are no gaps in the schedule where a customer would see no work being done. Flag any forced gaps (e.g. supply delays) to the Customer Success Coordinator so they can update the customer.

- When a tradesman needs slightly more time than a full day to finish (e.g. a day and 2 hours), assign an apprentice or labourer to help them finish faster. This avoids expensive call-out costs and delays to other jobs. Applicable to in-house staff only.

- Ensure all tradies have access to the property for the following day if required.

- Approve time off requests and make sure everyone books vacations well in advance.



### Tradies and Subcontractor Management



- Prepare tradies at the start of their day. Confirm everyone has what they need to do their work. If someone is not ready or available, find a replacement (internal or subcontractor) as a priority.

- Find subcontractors from the approved list on short notice when required.

- When someone calls in sick or has an emergency, source a replacement trade from approved contacts.

- Keep all tradie rates, terms, contact details and availability up to date at all times.

- Make sure tilers know where tiles and angles are stored. Same for fixtures - electricians and plumbers need to know where their materials are for rough-in and fit-off.



### Job Tracking and Completion



- Ensure all line items from the invoice are booked in advance and completed. Nothing gets missed.

- Make sure there are no gaps in subcontractor scheduling across each customer's job.

- Deal with emergencies (e.g. finding asbestos) and reorganise the schedule accordingly.



### Daily Updates (Internal)



- Prepare daily update content for the Customer Success Coordinator including what work was completed, and a plan for the next 3 days minimum based on the current schedule.

- When a scheduled job does not get completed as planned, find out what caused the delay, report to management, and confirm with the trade when they will return to finish. Pass all details to the Customer Success Coordinator for customer communication.



### Compliance and Administration



- Send Form 4 to QBCC at the start of every new bathroom renovation project.

- Pay Home Warranty Insurance for jobs above $3,300 before work starts or within 10 business days of deposit paid and contract signed, whichever comes first.



### Ordering and Specs (Bonus / Growth Area)



- Order fixtures and fittings for jobs.

- Check all requirements and specs (heights, widths, toilet trap types, current ratings, etc.) before ordering.

- Ensure everything is delivered in time for work to start.

- Store specs in the system for plumbers and tradies to access on-site.



---



## Systems Used



- **Go High Level (GHL)** - CRM, internal communication

- **Fergus** - Quoting, invoicing, job management and scheduling



---



If you're interested, please get back to me with the following

description:

Communication: Strong written and verbal English communication skills.



Market Knowledge: Experience running campaigns in Western markets (US/UK/AU) is highly preferred.



Work Arrangement & Salary

Location: 100% Remote.



Salary: Competitive hourly or monthly rate based on experience and portfolio.

title: Marketplace Listing Optimization Specialist (Amazon & Walmart)
description:
We are seeking an experienced Marketplace Listing Optimization Specialist to create, manage, and improve product listings across Amazon Seller Central and Walmart Marketplace.



This role focuses on building high-quality listings from scratch and improving organic performance through SEO and conversion optimization. There is no PPC management in this role.



You will be responsible for ensuring listings are properly created, structured, compliant, and optimized to maximize visibility and sales.



Key Responsibilities:

-Create new product listings on Amazon Seller Central and Walmart Marketplace

-Optimize existing listings to improve conversion rate and organic ranking

-Build listing content including:

--titles

--bullet points

--product descriptions

--backend search terms

--Conduct keyword research for organic SEO (not PPC campaigns)

--Ensure proper listing structure including attributes, variations, and categorization

--Improve product page clarity, trust, and buyer conversion

--Identify and resolve listing issues affecting visibility or indexing

--Analyze competitor listings and identify optimization opportunities

--Support listing improvements across multiple Amazon & Walmart accounts



Required Experience:

-2+ years experience with Amazon Seller Central and/or Walmart Marketplace

-Hands-on experience creating new product listings from scratch

-Strong experience in listing optimization and Amazon SEO

-Proven ability to improve conversion rate and organic product performance

-Experience working with multiple SKUs or product catalogs

Familiarity with keyword research tools (e.g., Helium 10 or similar)



Preferred Experience

-Experience managing listings on both Amazon and Walmart

-Experience working in an eCommerce brand or agency environment

-Understanding of product page conversion strategy (CRO)

-Experience with A+ content or enhanced product content

-Experience analyzing competitor listings and market positioning



Key Skills

-Strong analytical and optimization mindset

-Deep understanding of Amazon search and ranking structure

-Strong written English communication skills (required)

-Detail-oriented with strong execution discipline

-Ability to create and improve listings that drive conversions

-Organized and able to manage multiple product catalogs



Required Application Questions



Applications without answers will NOT be reviewed.



1. Listing Creation Experience - Describe a new product listing you created from scratch. What steps did you take from setup to optimization?



2. Optimization Example - Give an example of a listing you improved and what specific changes you made (title, bullets, keywords, structure, etc.). What was the result?



3. SEO + Keyword Strategy - How do you choose and apply keywords to improve organic ranking without using PPC campaigns?



Resume Requirement - Please attach your updated resume showing relevant Amazon/Walmart listing creation and optimization experience.



Applications without a resume will not be considered.

Remote

Long-term opportunity

Work hours performed on Eastern Standard Time (9AM - 5PM)

title: Design Assistant
description:
We need a production-minded designer who can build polished ad creatives and Canva templates

from AI-generated imagery — fast, consistently, and to a brief. You will receive a brief, a set of

images, and clear deliverables. Your job is to follow the brief exactly and produce the output as

instructed.



ABOUT DAY AFTER MARIA

Day After Maria is a US-based creative production company specializing in AI-generated brand imagery and

ad creative for small businesses. Our flagship product is the No-Photoshoot Ad Kit at $500 — in 48 hours,

every client receives 60 custom AI-generated images, 2 ad creatives, and Canva templates built to their brief.

We serve beauty brands, med spas, restaurants, e-commerce stores, coaches, and Amazon sellers across

the United States.



WHAT YOU WILL PRODUCE

You will receive a creative brief, a set of AI-generated images, and a clear set of deliverables. Your job is to

follow the brief exactly and produce the output as instructed — no more, no less. Every project follows the

same structure:

• Ad creatives built in Adobe Illustrator — 1080×1080 (square) and 1080×1920 (story/vertical) — sized,

exported, and named exactly as specified in the brief

• Canva templates — varied layouts, brand colors applied, all text boxes and image placeholders left

unlocked so the client can edit

• All files uploaded to the correct Google Drive subfolders as instructed — wrong folder means the

project is incomplete

• A completion note posted in 
 tagging Operations once everything is uploaded and ready

for review

Brand colors, fonts, mood, and anything listed under ‘What to Avoid’ in the brief are non-negotiable.

You do not interpret the brief. You execute it.



REQUIRED TOOLS

• Adobe Illustrator — required, not just familiar

• Canva — required, must understand template sharing (‘Use template’ links)

• Midjourney and/or Fal.ai — preferred; image generation knowledge is a plus

• Google Drive and 
 — all project delivery and communication



YOU MUST BE ABLE TO

• Build polished ad creatives to exact spec under a 10-hour window from brief receipt

• Follow a brief precisely — brand colors, fonts, mood, and ‘What to Avoid’ are non-negotiable

• Work independently with minimal supervision and ask for work when your queue is empty

• Be available on weekends when needed — non-negotiable

• Acknowledge project assignments in 
 within 1 hour during agreed shift hours

• Turn around revisions within 3 hours of receiving Mae’s notes



WHAT THIS ROLE IS NOT

• Not client-facing — you never communicate directly with clients

• Not image generation — image generation is handled separately; you work from the finished image

set

• Not a slow agency environment — turnarounds are 48 hours from brief to delivery



ROLE DETAILS

Shift: 3PM PST (6AM PHT)

Weekend availability: Required

Time tracking: Hubstaff required — random screenshots will be taken during shifts

Pay: $6.00 USD per hour

Trial period: All new hires begin with 1–3 paid trial days at the agreed rate before being brought on fully



APPLICATION QUESTIONS — ANSWER ALL 6

Include your answers in your application message. Applications that skip any question will not be reviewed.

1. What hours are you available and are you able to work weekends when needed?

2. Describe a time you ran out of tasks to do at work. What did you do?

3. What tools do you use daily and how comfortable are you learning new software?

4. What is your internet speed and computer setup? Paste a screenshot from 
 or speedtest.net.

5. Why do you want to work for a creative studio specifically?

6. Please share links to 3 examples of your best design work. At least one should include a flyer or ad

creative.



? HOW TO APPLY ?

 your application to 

Subject line: Design Assistant – [Your Name] – Ready to Start

Applications without this exact subject line will not be reviewed.

title: Inside Sales Closer — US Detailing Company — $600 Base + 7% Commission + Bonuses (OTE $1,500-$2,860)
description:
Read this entire post before applying. If you skim, you'll miss the instructions at the bottom and your application will be auto-rejected.



Who we are:

Golden Bay Detailing is a mobile auto detailing company in San Francisco. We're growing fast and we need a sharp, hungry Inside Sales Closer who wants to make real money from the Philippines.



The honest pitch on pay:

Base is $600/month. Paid weekly via Wise.

Commission is 7% on every completed job. Plus a $20 bonus for every ceramic coating you book that actually gets serviced.

Our minimum ticket is $250 and our average is higher. Ceramic coatings run $800-$2,500.

Real numbers on what you'll actually earn:



Average month (40 jobs closed, $400 average ticket): $600 base + $1,120 commission = $1,720/month

Strong month (60 jobs, $500 average ticket, 8 ceramic coatings): $600 + $2,100 + $160 = $2,860/month

There is no cap. The harder you work, the more you make.



Commissions are paid on the 1st of the following month for jobs that completed the prior month. Base pays weekly every Friday.

If you want a comfortable salary with no upside, this isn't for you. If you want to build a real income and you're willing to earn it, keep reading.



What you'll actually do:



Reply to Instagram and
 
 and close them over chat

Call every website form submission within 5 minutes of it landing

Send SMS follow-ups through our 
 phone system

Book appointments directly into Jobber

Call and text old customers from our CRM with reactivation offers

Keep your pipeline clean so no lead falls through



You are the front line of the business. The better you are, the more money you make. Simple.

Who you are:



2+ years closing for a US-based company (real estate ISA, home services, insurance, med spa, solar, roofing, anything with speed-to-lead)

Neutral American accent. You sound friendly, confident, and energetic on every call, even call #50 of the day

You follow scripts but you are not a robot. You can actually talk to humans.

You are obsessed with response time. You check your phone like it owes you money.

Reliable internet, backup power, quiet work environment

Available Monday to Saturday, 8am to 6pm Pacific Time (that's midnight to 10am Manila)

You want to be here for 2+ years, not 2 months



Who you are NOT:



Not someone looking for a "stable" office job with guaranteed pay

Not someone who needs to be micromanaged

Not someone who treats DMs and leads like paperwork

Not someone who disappears when the internet goes out

Not someone applying to 40 jobs today and copy-pasting the same cover letter



Why you'll love it here:



You pick up the phone, you make money. Direct cause and effect.

Paid weekly via Wise

Clear path to Team Lead once we hire a second closer (you train them, you get override commissions)

The owner actually trains you and answers your questions. You're not one of 50 VAs lost in a spreadsheet.

Long-term role with a real company that's scaling



How to apply (FOLLOW EVERY STEP OR GET REJECTED):

If you don't do all 3 of these, I will not read your application. This is the first test.



Step 1: In the very first line of your application, write: "I read the whole post and I want to make money." If you don't include this exact sentence, I'll know you skimmed.



Step 2: Record a 60-second voice memo. Tell me:

- Your name

- The best sale you ever closed and exactly how you closed it

- Why commission-based pay excites you more than a flat salary



Upload to Google Drive and share the link. No voice memo = auto reject.



Step 3: Answer this in your application:

"A customer DMs us: 'how much for Full Detail on my Tesla Model 3?'"

Type your exact word-for-word first reply. Not a summary. The actual message you'd send.



I hire fast for the right person. First call could be within 48 hours of your application. If you're the one, you'll know.

Talk soon.

title: Operations & GoHighLevel Virtual Assistant
description:

 management and general administrative tasks

Qualifications



          -  Strong experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) (funnels, automations, CRM)

          -  Experience in payment tracking or bookkeeping (preferred)

          -  Organized, detail-oriented, and proactive

          -  Strong written English communication skills

          -  Able to work independently and take initiative

          -  Comfortable working in a fast-paced, growing business 





If you believe you're a strong fit for this position, please respond with the following:



   1. A link to your resume in PDF format. 



Your resume should include your contact details, a recent professional photo, and a summary of your work experience, emphasizing tasks relevant to this role.



2. A screenshot of your PC specifications and internet speed, 



3. Your WhatsApp number for easy communication. 



To ensure you've read this message carefully, please include the word "GHLFLOW" in the subject line of your
.



We look forward to reviewing your application!
