title: Amazon Operations Manager (Full-Time) – 8-Figure Global Outdoor Brand
description:
Hi! We're Trekology — an established 8-figure global e-commerce brand in portable outdoor gear. We sell across Amazon US, UK, Canada, Australia, EU, and Singapore, plus our own Shopify storefront, and we're expanding into TikTok Shop USA.



We're a profitable, mature operation (not a startup), and we're looking for experienced Amazon Operations Managers to join our small, ownership-driven remote team for the long term.



This is a FULL-TIME, LONG-TERM role. We are not looking for freelancers juggling multiple clients. We invest heavily in onboarding, training, and career growth — and we expect the same long-term commitment in return.



????????????????????????????????????????

WHAT YOU WILL OWN

????????????????????????????????????????



- Portfolio & Account Management

  Manage 30+ SKUs across Amazon US, CA, UK, and AU. Monitor KPIs (CTR, CVR, TACoS, ACoS, review ratings). Maintain account health and compliance. Deliver monthly performance reports to the COO and CEO.



- Listing Optimization & SEO

  Own all listing improvements — titles, bullets, descriptions, A+ Content, storefronts. Conduct keyword research and coordinate with our design team on images and mobile-optimized content.



- PPC Oversight

  Work with the PPC team on campaign strategy. Run regular audits and restructuring. Track TACoS/ACoS trajectory. Weekly search term reviews and negative keyword hygiene.



- Customer Experience & Reviews

  Monitor review patterns, identify product quality issues, and recommend fixes.



- Market Research & Product Launches

  Analyze competitors and trends. Propose bundles, variations, and new niches. Validate demand, recommend pricing and positioning.



- Inventory & Promotions

  Coordinate 3–6 month inventory forecasting with logistics. Manage FBA, Amazon AWD, and 3PL coordination. Configure Coupons, Lightning Deals, and Prime Exclusive Discounts.



????????????????????????????????????????

MUST-HAVE QUALIFICATIONS

????????????????????????????????????????



? 3+ years of hands-on Amazon Private Label brand management

? Proven track record managing 30+ SKUs at once

? Hands-on Amazon PPC experience with measurable TACoS/ACoS improvement (you can independently audit and restructure campaigns)

? Strong analytical skills — Brand Analytics, Business Reports, Search Query Performance, Helium 10

? Deep knowledge of A+ Content, Brand Storefronts, SEO copywriting

? Solid FBA operations background (inventory, listing health, account health)

? Excellent written English (B2+ / Upper-Intermediate minimum)

? Stable internet and a quiet work environment

? Able to work 4–5 hours overlap daily with Hong Kong time (UTC+8) 

  — roughly a normal Philippines daytime schedule



????????????????????????????????????????

NICE-TO-HAVE

????????????????????????????????????????



- Experience with Amazon AWD and 3PL / multi-warehouse coordination

- Background in outdoor, sporting goods, or home/lifestyle categories

- TikTok Shop or multi-channel e-commerce expansion experience

- SOP and system-building experience for team collaboration



????????????????????????????????????????

TOOLS YOU WILL USE DAILY

????????????????????????????????????????



Amazon Seller Central, Helium 10, DataDive, Sellerboard, Keepa, Scale Insights, Brand Analytics, Canva, ClickUp/Asana, 

Excel/Google Sheets



????????????????????????????????????????

WHAT WE OFFER

????????????????????????????????????????



???? PHP 55,000–85,000/month ($1,000–$1,500 USD), negotiable based on experience

???? 100% remote, work from home

? Flexible schedule (4–5 hours Hong Kong timezone overlap required)

???? Paid vacation leave, sick leave, and Philippine public holidays

???? Training and courses at company expense

???? Career growth inside a scaling 8-figure brand

???? Salary paid before the 10th of each month via Wise transfer

???? Long-term employment with a stable, profitable company



????????????????????????????????????????

THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF...

????????????????????????????????????????



? You're looking for a side-hustle to run alongside other clients

? You're currently managing many brands for different employers

? You need constant direction and step-by-step instructions

? You're a VA or junior looking to "level up" at our expense — we 

  need proven experience from day one

? You have short-term or unstable availability



????????????????????????????????????????

HOW TO APPLY

????????????????????????????????????????



Please send your application with ALL of the following. Applications missing any of these will not be reviewed:



1. Your CV / Resume (PDF preferred)



2. A brief portfolio: describe 2–3 Amazon brands you've managed. Include marketplace(s), approximate SKU count, your scope of responsibility, and one measurable result you achieved (e.g., TACoS reduction, ranking improvement, revenue growth)



3. Answer these two questions briefly:

   a) What is the most impactful listing optimization you made in the last 12 months, and how did you measure its impact?

   b) Describe a time you identified and resolved an account health or compliance issue before it escalated.



4. Include the word "ownership" somewhere in your application so we know you read this posting carefully.



We read every application that follows these instructions. We look forward to hearing from you!



— Trekology Hiring Team

title: Part-Time B2B Cold Caller / Appointment Setter — US Web Design Agency — $6/hr + Bonuses — Night Shift
description:
IHN Digital is a US-based web design studio. We build professional 

websites for small trade and home-service businesses across the 

United States — roofers, plumbers, HVAC, landscapers, electricians, 

painters, concrete, fencing, remodeling, and similar. Many of these 

business owners have no website at all, so we help them get found on 

Google and turn phone calls into booked jobs.



We need a part-time appointment setter to cold call US small business 

owners, pitch a quick conversation about getting them a website, and 

book them on our calendar.



===========================================

COMPENSATION

===========================================

- $6/hour base, paid weekly 

- $30 bonus for every qualified meeting that shows up

- Realistic monthly earnings: $550 to $700 for 20 hours per week

- This is a long-term role. We want the same person for 12+ months.



===========================================

SCHEDULE

===========================================

- 4 hours per day, Monday through Friday (20 hours per week total)

- Call US small business owners during their local business hours 

  (Eastern, Central, or Pacific time) — this means a night shift in 

  the Philippines

- Only apply if you are okay with a night schedule



===========================================

WHAT YOU WILL DO

===========================================

- Make outbound cold calls to US business owners from our lead list

- Use our script and objection handling guide (we provide both)

- Log every call outcome in our Google Sheet

- Book qualified decision-makers on our calendar

- Join a short weekly call with me to review recordings and improve



===========================================

WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR

===========================================

- Proven US-market B2B cold calling experience (minimum 6 months)

- Clear, confident, professional English with minimal accent 

  (this is non-negotiable)

- Reliable fiber or fast internet (speed test will be required)

- Quiet home workspace, no background noise

- Your own laptop and USB headset

- Professional attitude — you will represent IHN Digital



===========================================

DO NOT APPLY IF

===========================================

- You have never cold called the US market

- Your English is heavily accented

- You can only work Philippines daytime hours

- You are an agency or middleman



===========================================

HOW TO APPLY (READ CAREFULLY)

===========================================

To prove you actually read this post, START YOUR REPLY WITH THE WORD 

"VEGAS" IN ALL CAPS. Then send me these two things:



1. A 60-second voice recording (Google Drive, Dropbox, or WhatsApp 

   link) where you pretend you are cold calling a US small business 

   owner named Mike who owns a roofing company. Use your own opener — 

   I want to hear how you naturally sound on the phone.



2. Two sentences about your best cold calling result ever — 

   number of dials, meetings booked, and close rate.



Applications missing any of the items will be ignored.



Looking forward to hearing from you.

— Ben

IHN Digital

You will start at $5/hour base for the first month and increase exponentially by helping me train and manage additional employees. However, there is a limit to what I can manage because I am also growing a sales team in America for the livestreams and need help with bookkeeping and moderating the livestreams.

I am looking for employees who will not work another job, who will not be late and who won't waste working hours not performing at 110%. There are high expectations for this job since it is highly compensated with base and growth of management. Please be aware that you will be tracked closely, showing up to your shift even by 1 minute late will result in your choice of automatic firing or pay deduction for 1 week, idle time shown on mouse and keyboard tracking will result in your choice of automatic firing or pay deduction. Your online 
 profile will be monitored and any other job applications after being hired will result in automatic firing. 



I am looking looking for someone who is motivated to grow with me longterm and will not waste my time, I have had previous poor experiences of employees who were working multiple jobs and making mistakes or not showing up on time, and it disrupts my business because an e-commerce livestream business with many moving parts is demanding. Please only apply if you are ready to make a lot of money but also have a lot of responsibility. title: Livestream host (e-commerce sales)
description:

title: Medical Scribe
description:
Position Summary



The Medical Scribe supports the provider by accurately documenting patient encounters. This role ensures smooth clinic workflow, precise charting, and improved efficiency in patient care. The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, organized, and comfortable working in a fast-paced clinical environment.



What You’ll Do



1. Document patient histories, exams, and treatment plans into the EMR

2. Record provider notes, orders, tests, and follow-up instructions

3. Review charts for accuracy

4. Support smooth clinic flow by keeping documentation organized

5. Maintain confidentiality and follow HIPAA guidelines



What We’re Looking For



- Experience as a medical scribe or similar role preferred

- Good typing speed and attention to detail

- Reliable, organized, and professional

- Experience in creating EHR/EMR notes for the providers, CPT and ICD codes.

- Familiarity with Manual Manipulation and Emsella note documentation (a plus).



To apply, please submit your updated resume and explain why you are a great fit to this role.

title: Social Media Manager
description:
SUMMARY



We are seeking a Social Media Manager who will be responsible for creating content and developing strategies that drive creator growth and brand impact. This role combines creativity with data-driven decision-making, crafting engaging content, optimizing influencer collaborations, and supporting creators to grow their audience and influence.



RESPONSIBILITIES



- Plan, launch, and optimize influencer marketing campaigns across specific assigned social media platforms

- Collaborate with internal teams to align influencer initiatives with brand campaigns, product and launches

- Track, measure, and report campaign performance using key metrics such as reach, engagement, conversions, and ROI.

- Stay updated on social media trends, platform updates, and emerging creators to keep campaigns fresh and competitive.

- Experiment with new formats (e.g., livestreams, co-branded content, affiliate partnerships) to drive growth and engagement.



QUALIFICATIONS



- Fluent in English (written and spoken)

- PREFERRED: 2+ years of experience in social media management, influencer coordination, or content scheduling

- Familiar with posting and scheduling on social media

- Quick learner who follows instructions well

- Highly organized and able to manage multiple accounts simultaneously

- Strong communication and teamwork skills

title: Executive Virtual Assistant
description:
Serviont is a premium estate management company serving two core clients: high-net-worth homeowners in Utah, USA and property management companies who need a trusted vendor for their properties. We consolidate every service a property needs — cleaning, landscaping, pool and spa care, pest control, painting, snow removal, and full estate management — into a single point of contact. Our clients make one call, and everything gets handled.

We're looking for an Executive Virtual Assistant to be the operational right hand of the founder. You'll handle inbound calls and
s, support business development outreach, apply to vendor lists on our behalf, manage CRM and scheduling, and keep operations running smoothly — all from SOPs we provide. This is not a task-list role. We want someone who thinks ahead, communicates proactively, and takes real ownership.

What you'll do:



Answer and respond to inbound calls and
s professionally

Outreach to luxury homeowners, realtors, builders, HOAs, and property management companies

Apply to vendor lists for property management groups on behalf of Serviont

Manage CRM, scheduling, follow-ups, and administrative tasks

Send proactive updates to the founder without being asked



Who you are:



Highly organized and self-directed — you execute without constant direction

Excellent written and spoken English

Motivated by performance and commission upside

Comfortable in a fast-moving, early-stage company

Proficient with Notion, Google Workspace, or similar tools

title: Administrative Manager
description:
Administrative Manager (Full-Time | Remote | Residential Construction)



Schedule: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Time

Employment Type: Full-Time (40 hours/week)



About Us:

We are a growing residential construction and development company focused on high-quality infill housing projects. We are a small, high-performing team that takes pride in delivering exceptional results for our clients. Every tea
mber plays a meaningful role and is trusted to take ownership of their work. We value people who are highly organized, detail-oriented, proactive, and comfortable working independently within well-defined systems and processes. Our culture is built around accountability, clear communication, and supporting one another so everyone can perform at a high level. This role is best suited for someone who enjoys taking initiative, keeping things organized, and being part of a professional team that holds itself to a high standard.



Compensation:

We offer competitive full-time compensation based on experience and performance. We value long-term tea
mbers and reward reliability, strong performance, and growth within the company. This position is best suited for someone looking for stable, long-term work with a professional team, not short-term freelance work.



Position Overview:

We are hiring a full-time Administrative Manager to oversee and coordinate the administrative operations of our company. This role serves as the organizational backbone of the team—managing communication, scheduling, documentation, and internal coordination while ensuring a smooth and professional experience for both our team and our clients.



Key Responsibilities:

• Manage company and executive
 inboxes and calendars

• Communicate with U.S.-based customers by phone and

• Schedule consultations, meetings, and follow-ups

• Maintain organized digital files and documentation

• Track compliance items such as insurance certificates, lien releases, and tax filings

• Monitor deadlines and follow up with tea
mbers to keep projects moving

• Lead weekly tea
etings and help maintain accountability across the team

• Help improve and maintain company systems, organization, and workflows



Required Qualifications:

• Excellent spoken and written English

• Proficiency in Microsoft Word & Excel

• Highly organized and detail-oriented

• Able to work independently and manage responsibilities proactively



When applying, please address your application message to David, and begin your application message with the phrase Systems Create Success. Also please include a 30–60 second video recording of yourself describing your relevant work experience.



Thank you!

We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Sales Closer | WFH | Filipino Clients | Dayshift
description:
** Please read Qualification instructions below before applying **





Help Filipino families and OFW's secure or refinance their home loans - and change their lives.



**About Nook**



Nook is the Philippines’ first digital mortgage brokerage. We help homeowners get home loans from our major banking partners (BDO, BPI, etc) - faster, smarter, and fully online.



Backed by major bank partners and cutting-edge tech tools, we’re on a mission to help 1 million Filipino families save money and pay off their homes sooner. 



And we’re not doing it with old-school brokers… we’re building a sales machine.



** The Role: Remote Sales Closer**



We’re hiring experienced sales closers who know how to move deals forward.



Not admins. Not processors. Not paper-pushers. Closers.



If you’ve sold to US, AU, or UK customers (real estate, telco, insurance, fintech, etc.) - we want you.



This is NOT a customer service role. This is a high-performance sales role for people who love closing deals, hitting targets, and getting results for clients.



** What You’ll Do**



- Handle warm, pre-qualified leads who already want a home loan

- Guide clients through their home loan options (full training provided)

- Collect documents using our AI tools (no need to chase paperwork manually)

- Follow up with clients and banks to move deals forward fast

- Hit your monthly referral, approval, and booking targets

- Be part of a high-performance remote team that wins together



** You’re a Fit If You Have:**



- 2+ years of experience in inbound, outbound or consultative sales (BPO, telco, fintech, SaaS, insurance, etc.)

- A personal track record of hitting sales KPIs and closing deals

- Excellent, confident communication skills (written & spoken - Tagalog and occasional English)

- Experience using CRMs (Zoho, Salesforce, HubSpot, etc.)

- High accountability, self-motivation, and hunger for results

- Quiet WFH setup (laptop/desktop with strong internet, headset, no background noise)



** Bonus Points If You:**



- Have worked with US/AU/UK-based companies

- Understand mortgage, real estate, or finance (not required - we’ll train you anyway)

- Want to grow fast in a startup that rewards performance



** What You Get**



- Base salary and sales bonuses

- Full work-from-home flexibility

- Weekly coaching and performance feedback

- AI tools that make your work faster and easier

- Be part of a high-growth fintech startup transforming an entire industry



** This Role Is Not for:**



- PH banking staff, back-office processors or customer service reps

- Passive agents waiting on leads to “d
”

- People afraid to follow up or ask for the sale

- Job hoppers or multi-jobbers (please don’t apply)





** Qualification **



- Previous applicants need not apply.

- This is not a customer service role.

- Must have had sales experience (not retail sales).

- No multi jobbers or sidelines.

- Experience selling to foreigners is not part of the job but applicants with this experience are highly desired.

- Must have a DISC personality test result in your OnlineJobsPH profile to be considered.





** How to Apply**



Send your resume + DISC profile result

title: Appointment Setter/Cold Caller

Blue Harbor Media is a results-driven digital marketing agency committed to helping businesses grow through strategic marketing solutions. We value professionalism, consistency, and strong communication across our teams.

This role is responsible for engaging prospects, qualifying leads, and scheduling appointments for our sales team. The ideal candidate is confident on the phone, highly organized, and experienced in outbound and inbound appointment setting.

- Schedule and confirm appointments for the sales team

- Maintain accurate records of calls, leads, and appointments in the CRM

- Follow up with leads via phone,
, and messaging platforms as needed

- Strong verbal communication and interpersonal skills

- Proven experience handling outbound and inbound calls

- Experience using CRM systems and basic sales tools

- Strong organizational and time-management skills

- Goal-oriented mindset with the ability to work under targets

- Ability to work onsite in West Rembo, Taguig



Preferred Qualifications

title: Social Media Marketer (7 Figure Online Music Education Company)
description:
(DO NOT
 US YOUR RESUME. WE ONLY CONSIDER CANDIDATES WHO FILL OUT OUR APPLICATION BELOW)



About the Role:



If you're someone who loves social media marketing, gets just as excited about strategy as you do building out content, and wants to take ownership of a key marketing channel in a growing online business, read on...



Learn Jazz Standards is a thriving 7-figure online music education business helping adult musicians finally learn to play jazz without the overwhelm. We're a small team, and that allows us to work fast. We've built a healthy content ecosystem across YouTube, blog, podcast, and
 — and now we're ready to make social media a serious, measurable growth channel.



We're looking for a Social Media Marketer who can do it all: build and execute a strategy, manage the content calendar, create and repurpose content, run ManyChat funnels, and ultimately turn Instagram and
 into real lead generation and sales engines for our business. This role sits at the intersection of execution (posting, scheduling, replying to comments) and strategic marketing (lead gen funnels, selling in the DMs, data driven decision making).



This is a full-time remote role reporting directly to the Founder. You'll be given strategic direction and goals, but we expect you to bring your own ideas, initiatives, and creative thinking to the table.



What You'll Own:



Content Strategy & Execution:



Dramatically increase our content output across Instagram and
 — both in volume and quality

Develop and manage a content calendar using tools like Meta Business Suite or Metricool

Repurpose our deep content library (YouTube videos, course clips, live Q&As, podcast transcripts, blog posts) into platform-native content: Reels, Stories, carousels, static graphics, and more

Write compelling captions, select strategic hashtags, and publish content consistently

Respond to and manage post comments, and interact with leads in the DMs



Content Creation:



Create graphics and short-form video edits when needed (basic video editing required — we have a video editor for heavier lifts, but you need to be able to move fast independently)

Work within our existing brand assets while having the skill to build new templates in Canva or similar tools when the 
nt calls for it



Lead Generation & Sales (Our Primary Objective):



Build and manage ManyChat funnels to convert social media engagement into
 subscribers and customers

Create automated DM flows that generate leads and nurture toward sales

Develop lead magnets from our existing content library to drive opt-ins

Think like a marketer first: every piece of content should serve a lead generation or sales objective



Strategy & Analytics:



Analyze platform data to understand what's working, what's not, and why

Bring data-informed recommendations to weekly strategy sessions with the Founder

Proactively identify new opportunities for growing reach, leads, and sales

Build repeatable systems and document your processes so nothing lives only in your head



What the First 90 Days Look Like:



By the end of your first 90 days, we expect you to have:



Built out a new and improved social media strategy alongside the Founder

Taken full ownership of the content calendar and posting schedule

Meaningfully increased our content output across Instagram and

Launched at least one ManyChat funnel driving measurable leads

Established a reporting rhythm with clear KPIs and progress updates

Demonstrated early, measurable progress — in leads, engagement, or both



What Makes You a Great Fit:



Must-Haves:



-3+ years of experience managing social media for a brand with a lead generation or sales focus — not just vanity metrics

Demonstrated ability to build ManyChat (or equivalent) funnels from scratch — chat automations, DM sequences, lead gen flows



-Strong content creation skills: you can write a great caption, design a clean graphic, and do basic video editing without needing hand-holding



-Comfortable with analytics — you know how to read the data and make decisions from it

Systems-oriented: you build repeatable processes, document your work, and don't let things fall through the cracks



-Self-starter who takes initiative rather than waiting to be told what to do



-Proficient with tools like Meta Business Suite, Metricool (or similar), Canva, and AI tools for content ideation and creation



Strong Plusses:

-Background in

title: Amazon FBA Wholesale Buyer – Experienced Only
description:
Amazon FBA Wholesale Buyer - Remote  |  Full-time  |  Amazon FBA Wholesale



We are looking for an experienced Amazon FBA Wholesale Buyer to join our remote team. In this role, you'll own the buying process, from scanning wholesale catalogs and evaluating profitability to creating clean purchase orders and tracking performance. If you're fluent in Keepa, RevSeller, and Amazon Seller Central, we'd love to hear from you.





KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

-Analyze product profitability using RevSeller, Keepa, and similar tools to make confident purchasing decisions.

-Assess sales rank, pricing history, sales velocity, and competition to evaluate buying opportunities.

-Scan wholesale catalogs and price lists to identify profitable SKUs and create accurate, well-organized purchase orders.

-Maintain and update tracking sheets and reports in Google Sheets/Excel.

-Manage tasks, priorities, and projects through ClickUp.

-Source wholesale items with a focus on healthy margins, strong sell-through, and brand/compliance alignment.





REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE

-3+ years of experience in Amazon FBA wholesale buying or product sourcing.

-Proven experience analyzing vendor catalogs and data to identify profitable buying opportunities.

-Strong understanding of RevSeller, Keepa, and similar tools to evaluate profitability and sales history.

-Demonstrated ability to scan catalogs, shortlist products, and execute purchase orders accurately.

-High proficiency in Google Sheets/Excel (filters, basic formulas, sorting, etc.) and strong overall tech savvy.

-Experience using ClickUp (or similar project management tools) to manage daily work.

-Track record of sourcing profitable wholesale products for Amazon FBA.

-Strong communication skills and ability to work collaboratively with a remote team.



Bonus Skills

Experience with TPP and Source Correct is a plus 



HOW TO APPLY

Fill out the application form:



1. Inside the form, please include a 5–10 minute Loom video where you:

2. Show how you use Keepa and RevSeller (or similar tools) to d
 if a product is a good buy.

3. Briefly walk through how you would scan a wholesale catalog and shortlist products.

title: National Customer Experience Officer
description:
About the Role

You’ll be working with our Customer Experience team in Australia, handling customer enquiries across phone, Live Chat, and Salesforce. You’ll help manage orders, resolve customer issues, and make sure every interaction is handled quickly, accurately, and professionally. You’ll also support credit claims, maintain system updates, and work closely with internal teams to deliver a smooth customer experience.



Key Responsibilities



• Manage inbound customer enquiries via phone, Live Chat, and Salesforce

• Provide accurate information on orders, deliveries, products, and services

• Keep customers updated on order progress, delays, or issues

• Log all customer interactions and updates in Salesforce

• Investigate and resolve delivery issues, missing stock, and product queries

• Work with Warehouse, Sales, and Logistics teams to resolve issues quickly

• Raise and process credit claims accurately and on time

• Maintain clear case notes and follow internal processes

• Identify recurring issues and suggest improvements

• Support team KPIs and work closely with the Customer Experience team



What You Need



• Experience in a customer service or customer experience role

• Great English communication skills (written and spoken)

• Strong attention to detail and time management

• Able to multitask and handle competing priorities

• Problem-solving mindset and proactive approach

• Experience using CRM systems (Salesforce preferred)

• Ability to work independently and as part of a team



If you’re customer-focused, reliable, and ready to be part of a great team, we’d love to hear from you!



Please send your resume and a short cover letter telling us why you’re a great fit.

title: SEO Content Editor & Ghostwriter (Native-Level US English, WordPress, Internal Linking)
description:
We’re seeking a talented SEO Content Editor and Ghostwriter to bring fresh energy and expertise to our Florida-based website.



If you’re looking to truly make a difference—rather than just posting more articles—you’ll find this role rewarding. Our goal is to build on what we have, not start over.



We already have:



* 18 published blog articles

* Around 30 existing pages

* One article cluster that is linked correctly (French Toast)

* Several other articles and service pages that still need:

  * stronger human tone

  * better internal linking

  * clearer topical structure

  * better connection between blog content and service pages



Our first priority is to improve the existing content.



Main Responsibilities:



* Audit existing blog posts and key pages.

* Refresh or lightly refine our content so it sounds natural, warm, and genuinely American in tone.

* Improve internal linking across existing pages and articles.

* Spot weak content and recommend linking, expanding, repositioning, or new support.

* Use our existing spreadsheet and keep all work organized in one system.

* Suggest new content only when necessary, and only with clear reasoning.



Important Rules:



* Do not make major structural changes without approval.

* Prioritize improving current content over suggesting significant new content volumes.

* AI support is fine, but the writing must feel human and natural.



Requirements:



* Native-level US English

* Strong experience editing existing SEO content

* Strong internal linking skills

* Experience with WordPress

* Ability to write in a human, conversational, non-robotic tone

* Good judgment about what content should be improved first



Deliverables:



* Content audit spreadsheet

* Internal linking recommendations

* Revised article samples

* List of isolated or weak pages/articles with recommended action

* Limited, prioritized content gap suggestions



Please Answer:



1. How would you improve internal linking on a site with existing articles and service pages?

2. How do you humanize an SEO article without hurting rankings?

3. How do you d
 whether a piece of content should be updated, expanded, or left alone?

4. What tools do you personally use for content audits and internal linking?



Paid Test:

Please rewrite 300–500 words from one existing article in a more natural and engaging tone.

Also, suggest 5 internal links you would add, including anchor text and reason for each.

title: Appointment Setter (Consumer Protection Law)
description:
Are you a persuasive communicator who enjoys making a difference in others lives? We are a  law firm dedicated to helping real people with debt related legal issues. We aren’t looking for script-readers; we’re looking for empathetic professionals who can turn warm leads into scheduled calls.



 A Note on Authenticity: We value human connection above all else. AI-generated applications will be declined. 



*Key Responsibilities*

This is not cold calling. You will be speaking with individuals who have called us or opted-in through our advertisements and are actively seeking help. Your mission is to qualify their situation, confirm they are someone we can help, empathize, and schedule them for a call with an attorney.

High-Volume Engagement: Manage 100+ outbound calls per day using our power dialer.

Lead Qualification: Use our question-based framework to discover pain points and identify viable legal cases.

Objection Handling: Confidently navigate concerns regarding privacy and the legal process.

KPI Management: Meet daily targets for dials, utilization rates, and signup conversions.



*Requirements & Qualifications*

Experience: 1+ years of high-volume phone sales (Legal, Banking, or Insurance experience is a major plus).

Language: Exceptional, fluent English is mandatory. You must have a natural, conversational tonality. Spanish speaking is preferred but not required.

Results Driven: You thrive in performance-based environments and are motivated by hitting (and exceeding) targets.

Resilience: You hear "I want to think about it" and view it as the start of the conversation, not the end.

Tech Savvy: You are comfortable navigating a modern sales stack. While we provide training, prior experience with the following tools is a significant advantage:

CRMs & Automation: GoHighLevel and Lawcus.

Communication Suites: PhoneBurner (Power Dialer) and Zoom.

Documentation: Proficiency with Docusign for securing client retainers.



*Compensation & Culture*

Stable Hourly Pay + Performance Bonuses: Your earning potential is directly tied to your results. The better you perform, the more you take home.

Productivity-Focused: This is not a "clock in, clock out" corporate job. We pay for active, productive hours spent dialing, following up, and onboarding clients.

Growth & Support: You will be trained and supported by a team that wants to see you thrive.

Shift: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM EST (We offer some flexibility for the right candidate).



*How to Apply*

To be considered, please provide your resume and video recording with answers to the following questions. Do not use AI for these answers—we want to see your personality! Note: we prefer a conversational tonality.

Introduction Video: Please send a short video (Loom or Google Drive) introducing yourself. First, tell us why you’re a great fit and detail your past sales results and KPIs. 



Then include responses to the following questions:

Objection Handling (Part 1): A prospect says, “I just want to know how much the services cost.” How would you handle this?

Objection Handling (Part 2): A prospect says, “I’ve been burned before, I don’t know what’s wrong with my credit, and I don’t even know if this is worth it.” How do you respond?

Resilience: You’ve made 90 calls today and nobody has picked up. What is your next move?

Motivation: Why are you specifically seeking a performance-based sales role?

title: Affiliate Manager
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



Voax Media is a performance network serving the US pay-per-call and lead generation market. We connect advertisers and publishers across Insurance, Home Services, and Financial Services, with full campaign visibility on both sides of the transaction.



We are early. We are intentional about who we bring in. This is our first publisher facing hire, and we need someone who has actually done this work, not someone who is figuring it out alongside us.



If you have real experience managing publisher and affiliate relationships in pay-per-call or performance marketing, and you want to be a foundational part of building something from the ground up, this is the role.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Recruit and onboard publishers and call centers sending inbound call traffic in Insurance, Home Services, and Financial Services

- Manage day-to-day publisher relationships: payout negotiations, performance reviews, traffic quality conversations

- Monitor publisher performance using our call tracking platform and flag traffic quality issues before they become billing disputes

- Identify new publisher sources and expand our supply across active verticals

- Work directly with the CEO to align publisher supply with active advertiser demand

- Own publisher communication: onboarding, updates, campaign changes, and escalations



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



- Direct experience at a performance network, pay-per-call network, or affiliate network, not general digital marketing

- Hands-on publisher or affiliate account management, not just campaign operations

- Familiarity with inbound call or live transfer campaigns and how they are structured and priced

- Experience working with US-based publishers or traffic partners

- Working knowledge of Trackdrive or a comparable call tracking platform

- Clear, direct communicator — able to manage relationships, resolve disputes, and hold publishers accountable without burning them

- Available to work hours that overlap with US business hours



WHAT WE OFFER



- Competitive base salary

- Performance-based commission structure. Your income grows as the publisher network grows

- Fully remote

- Direct access to leadership — no layers, no bureaucracy

- A role that matters from day one. You are not joining a team of 40 affiliate managers. You are building the function.

title: International B2B Sales Manager – Branded Beauty Exports
description:
We are a U.S.-based distribution company specializing in well-known beauty brands including hair care, skin care, perfumes, and personal care products.



Our goal is to sell to customers worldwide outside the United States. We are looking to hire an experienced B2B sales professional who can find and develop international buyers only.



The right candidate must have experience in the branded beauty industry, understand wholesale/export sales, and ideally already know importers, distributors, wholesalers, and retail buyers in overseas markets.



This is a performance-driven role focused on generating real sales opportunities.



Responsibilities

Find customers worldwide outside the USA

Sell branded beauty products to international buyers

Develop relationships with distributors, wholesalers, importers, and retailers

Open new countries and export markets

Negotiate pricing, terms, and volume deals

Manage accounts from first contact to repeat orders

Provide feedback on market demand and opportunities

Coordinate with our U.S. team on inventory and shipments

Requirements

Proven B2B sales experience in branded beauty products

Experience with hair care, skin care, fragrance, or personal care categories

Strong knowledge of international wholesale/export sales

Existing buyer contacts outside the USA is a major plus

Strong communication and negotiation skills

Self-motivated and results-driven

Able to work independently

Ideal Candidate

Already has buyers in Latin America, Europe, Middle East, Africa, Asia, or Caribbean

Has sold recognized beauty brands before

Understands pricing, margins, and global distribution

Can generate business quickly

Compensation

Base pay + commission or commission-only for strong candidates

Long-term opportunity with growth potential





Please send:

Your experience in branded beauty B2B sales

Countries where you have buyer relationships

Types of buyers you work with

Deals you have closed

Why you are a fit for this role

description:
We are looking for a Copywriter / Social Media Specialist to join our team!



About the Role:

We are looking for a creative and detail-oriented Copywriter / Social Media Specialist to manage our online presence across key platforms. This role is responsible for planning, writing, and publishing engaging content while maintaining a consistent brand voice and messaging.



The role also includes copywriting for social media posts and ads, so we are looking for someone who can create content that is not only engaging but also supports campaign goals and audience growth.



Key Responsibilities:

• Manage social media platforms such as
, Instagram, and TikTok

• Plan, write, and publish engaging content for social media posts

• Write clear and compelling copy for ads, captions, hooks, and promotional content

• Maintain posting schedules and ensure brand consistency across platforms

• Support content planning for campaigns, promotions, and audience engagement

• Track content performance and engagement metrics

• Write and send
 marketing campaigns, including promotional
s, newsletters, and automated sequences



Requirements:

• Proven experience in managing social media platforms

• Excellent command of written English and grammar

• Strong copywriting, creative writing, and research skills

• Able to write engaging content for both social media posts and ad campaigns

• Highly organized, detail oriented, and able to meet deadlines

• Familiarity with tools such as Semrush, Later, Meta Business Suite

• Experience in
 marketing, including writing
 copy and managing campaigns using tools such as Klaviyo or Wix



Working days and hours:

• Full-time basis – 40 hrs/week (Mon–Fri)

• Working hours: 10 am to 6:30 pm (30 min lunch break)

• 14 days of Paid Annual Leave and Paid Public Holiday Benefits (all major holidays in the Philippines) included



Application Instructions:

Please submit your application with the following (applications without these will be less considered):

• Your CV/Resume.

If you do not have experience, please be honest and state so as well.

title: Loan Data Analyst (Credit Decisioning Focus)
description:
About the Role



We are an Australian-based private lender seeking a highly detail-oriented Loan Data Analyst with experience working alongside credit decisioning frameworks or rule books.



This role goes beyond basic data review — you will play a key part in structuring financial data in line with credit policy, ensuring our assessors can make fast, consistent, and responsible lending decisions.



Key Responsibilities



• Review and analyse customer bank transaction data (last 90 days)

• Categorise income, expenses, and liabilities in line with internal credit rules

• Apply and interpret credit policy / rulebook guidelines to real customer data

• Identify financial behaviours such as:



Gambling activity

BNPL usage

Payday lending / wage advances

Overdraft reliance

• Prepare clear, structured summaries aligned to decisioning requirements

• Flag inconsistencies, risks, or policy breaches for escalation

• Support continuous improvement of credit rules and data structuring processes

• Maintain strict privacy, confidentiality, and data handling standards

What We’re Looking For



• Experience working with credit rulebooks, decisioning frameworks, or lending policies

• Background in lending, fintech, credit risk, or financial data analysis

• Strong understanding of:



Income verification

Expense analysis

Liability assessment

Responsible lending principles

• Proven ability to identify patterns, anomalies, and risk indicators in transaction data

• High attention to detail and structured thinking

• Ability to follow and apply rules consistently (not just interpret data)

• Strong written English and ability to present clear, logical summaries

Important – Privacy & Data Handling



You will be working with sensitive financial data. All work must be completed in line with strict privacy and confidentiality requirements.

No customer data is to be stored, shared, or used outside of authorised systems.



Application Requirement (Mandatory)



To be considered for this role, you must provide:



A sample of a credit rulebook, decisioning framework, or policy you have previously worked with

This can be anonymised or redacted if required

It should demonstrate how decisions are made (e.g. income rules, expense thresholds, risk flags)

Examples of categorised transaction data, ensuring:

All personal information is removed or anonymised

No real customer names, account numbers, or identifiable details

Clear grouping of transactions (e.g. income, rent, utilities, gambling, BNPL, discretionary spending)



Applications without these examples will not be considered.



Why Join Us?



• Work with a fast-growing Australian lender building a scalable credit model

• Be part of a structured, data-driven decisioning environment

• Long-term opportunity with growth into credit risk and policy development

• High-impact role influencing how lending decisions are made

title: IT Audit Associate CISA
description:
We are looking for an IT Audit Associate with an active CISA certification to join our SOC 2 attestation practice. This role strengthens the firm’s IT audit competence by bringing formal information systems audit training and methodology to our evidence review and control evaluation processes. You will work alongside our evidence review team and the engagement partner to evaluate the design and operating effectiveness of controls across the trust services criteria.



This is a hands-on role. You will review technical evidence, assess control environments for startup-stage service organizations, identify exceptions and deviations, and help ensure our engagement files meet professional standards. You will also contribute to the firm’s internal quality by helping develop and deliver SOC 2 methodology training for the broader team and supporting our inspection and monitoring processes.



Required Qualifications

•  Active CISA (Certified Information Systems Auditor) certification in good standing with ISACA

•  Minimum 3 years of experience in information systems auditing, IT controls, or information security (consistent with CISA experience requirements)

•  Familiarity with SOC 2 examinations, AICPA Trust Services Criteria, or SSAE attestation standards

•  Working knowledge of cloud infrastructure (AWS required; GCP, Azure, or DigitalOcean a plus) including IAM, networking, logging, and security services

•  Understanding of IT general controls: access management, change management, operations, and physical/logical security

•  Available to work 40 hours per week during U.S. business hours (core hours overlap required; flexible within Eastern, Central, or Pacific time)

•  Strong written communication skills — you will document findings, draft workpapers, and write assessment memos that need to withstand peer review scrutiny

•  Ability to work independently within a structured methodology while knowing when to escalate

Westward Renovation is looking for a sharp, creative, and results-driven Social Media & Lead Generation Manager to help us generate organic leads and book qualified appointments.



We need someone who understands how to build attention online, create trust with homeowners, and turn content into real inquiries. This role is not just about posting pretty pictures. We want someone who can help grow our presence, create strategic content, run ads, and bring in real opportunities.



What You’ll Be Doing:

 • Manage and grow our Instagram and
 presence

 and Instagram ads

 preferred

description:

Who We Are: 

We are Seattle's #1 vacation rental management company, and our employees rarely leave us. We're a company with a heart—we believe in genuine connections with employees, and upholding a toxic-free culture where you can grow. 



Why You Want to Work Here:

We've built something different. Here's what makes us stand out:

- Direct access to leadership — Your ideas are important, and they reach decision-makers immediately. 

- Process improvements — We are creating a better company every day. Refining processes to make your job easier = more energy to think and do your best.  

- We truly want you to grow — We promote employees purely based on results and you will have career planning with actual decision makers.

title: Video Editor / Graphic Designer - Viral Organic + D2C Meta Ads (Remote, Full-Time)
description:
Job Overview

Hypetribe Asia is hiring a Video Editor / Graphic Designer (ideally one person who does both) to join one of our portfolio brands or agencies.



We're a venture studio running viral organic content and high-converting UGC-style D2C Meta ads for US and international brands. This is not a trainee role,  we're looking for someone who's already made organic channels go viral through editing, or driven real conversion numbers on paid ads, and can walk into our team and tell us why things work.



If you've worked with US-based companies, sat through enough client feedback loops to have your own strong POV on what scrolls past vs. what stops the scroll, keep reading.



What You'll Actually Do

-Edit short-form video content (Reels, TikToks, Shorts) for viral organic and paid ad performance

-Design static ads, thumbnails, and social graphics across our portfolio brands

-Cut UGC-style D2C Meta ads from raw creator footage (hook-forward, conversion-driven)

-Bring your own POV on hooks, pacing, captions, and visual trends — we want your taste, not just your hands

-Teach the team what you've learned from past US-client work about what converts and what goes viral

-Collaborate with our creative directors, producers, and media buyers across time zones

-Iterate fast based on performance data (you'll actually see the numbers on your work  most agencies don't show you this)

-Working knowledge of AI tools in your daily workflow — you're already using them to move faster, not resisting them. Think: generative image tools (Midjourney, Nano Banana, Higgsfield, Flux), AI video tools (Runway, Kling, Sora, Veo), AI audio (ElevenLabs, Suno), and AI-assisted editing



Nice to Have

-Motion graphics / After Effects template building

-Color grading experience (DaVinci Resolve or Premiere Lumetri)

-Experience editing for health, wellness, beauty, or D2C consumer brands

-Understanding of Meta Ads Manager basics (you don't need to buy, but you should know what the media buyer is asking for)

title: Track & Trace Assistant – Quality Assurance
description:
GH Logistics is a growing freight brokerage and asset based logistics company specializing in dry van and reefer freight. Our team is built on strong systems, clear communication, and reliable execution. As we continue to scale nationally, we are looking for a Track & Trace Assistant – Quality Assurance to help ensure that every load is verified, compliant, and properly tracked before it moves. If you’re someone who notices the small details, enjoys organized processes, and takes pride in preventing problems before they happen this role may be a great fit.



Role Overview

Your work directly prevents missed pickups, tracking gaps, compliance issues, and communication breakdowns while collaborating closely with Operations, Sales, and Management to ensure loads move smoothly and safely with clear SOPs, structured workflows, and strong team support to help you succeed.



What You’ll Be Doing

• Review next day loads before execution

• Verify driver details (name, phone number, reachability)

• Confirm CDL validity and compliance

• Assign and confirm active tracking (FourKites and/or Samsara)

• Call drivers to confirm pickup and delivery details, appointment times, and equipment requirements

• Download and upload customer tenders when applicable

• Ensure load information is accurate in the TMS and QA trackers

• Document findings clearly and consistently

• Escalate issues when something does not meet standards

• Maintain organized records and support process improvements



What Success Looks Like

• All next day loads are reviewed before execution

• Tracking is active and confirmed

• Potential issues are caught early

• Documentation is clear and organized

• Escalations are timely and professional



Who We’re Looking For

• Have experience in US. logistics, freight, tracking, quality assurance, or operational audit

• Are comfortable auditing details and verifying information

• Understand that small details prevent big operational problems

• Follow SOPs consistently

• Communicate clearly with drivers and internal teams

• Stay organized while handling multiple tasks

title: Cold Calling & Appointment Setting Specialist
description:
Cold Calling & Appointment Setting Specialist (Remote)

Lightning Bin Wash – Brandon / Riverview, FL

Position: Remote Cold Caller / Appointment Setter

Location: Philippines (Remote)

Schedule: Monday–Friday | Full-Time

Working Hours: 11:30 AM – 7:30 PM Eastern Time (US)

Starting Pay: $5/hour + Bonus Opportunities



Lightning Bin Wash is hiring two full-time Cold Calling & Appointment Setting Specialists to support our growing service operation in Florida.

You will be responsible for calling homeowners, introducing our service, and scheduling discounted bin cleaning appointments for our technician to complete.

This is not a casual or temporary role. We are looking for reliable tea
mbers who want to grow with a small but serious company.

You will be working directly with leadership and helping generate the appointments that fuel our entire operation.



The Schedule

This is a full-time remote position.

Working hours will be:

11:30 AM – 7:30 PM Eastern Time (US)

 Monday through Friday

This schedule allows you to reach homeowners during the most effective calling hours in the United States.

Consistency is extremely important for this role.

You must have:

• Reliable high-speed internet

 • A quiet working environment

 • A professional headset and microphone

 • Strong English communication skills



What You’ll Be Doing

Your primary responsibility is outbound cold calling and appointment setting.

We provide the systems and dialing tools that will automatically generate calls for you. Your job is to focus on speaking with homeowners and booking appointments.

You’ll be responsible for:

• Making outbound calls to homeowners in targeted neighborhoods

 • Introducing Lightning Bin Wash and our service offer

 • Setting discounted cleaning appointments for our technician

 • Recording call outcomes in our system

 • Following the calling scripts and improving them over time

 • Maintaining a professional and friendly tone on every call

 • Hitting daily and weekly call and appointment targets

You will be trained on our systems, scripts, and appointment process.

Experience with cold calling or sales is helpful, but the most important qualities are communication, discipline, and resilience.



What We Are Hiring For

There are four non-negotiables for this role.

1. Communication Skills

You must speak clear, confident English and be comfortable having conversations with homeowners in the United States.

This role requires professionalism, friendliness, and the ability to build quick rapport on the phone.

2. Reliability

We depend on consistent calling activity every day.

This is not a role where you log in casually or disappear during shifts. We are looking for someone who shows up consistently and treats the position seriously.

3. Determination

Cold calling requires persistence. Some people will say no.

We need someone who stays positive, keeps dialing, and understands that results come from consistent effort.

4. Coachability

We are constantly improving our scripts, processes, and approach.

You must be open to feedback, training, and continuous improvement.

If you bring these traits, you will do very well in this role.



What You’ll Get

• $5 per hour base pay

 • Bonus opportunities based on appointments set and performance

 • Training on cold calling, sales communication, and appointment setting

 • The opportunity to grow with a fast-growing service company

We are building a team that takes pride in their work and performs at a high level.

You won’t be just another caller in a large call center. Your work directly impacts the growth of our company.



Who This Is Not For

If you dislike making phone calls, this role will not be a good fit.

If you struggle with consistency or discipline, this role will not work.

If you are looking for a passive job where you simply log in and wait, this is not the position.

But if you enjoy speaking with people, are motivated by hitting targets, and want to grow inside a company that values performance, we want to hear from you.



How to Apply

Send a short introduction video explaining:

• Your experience with cold calling or sales (if any)

 • Why you believe you would be a good fit for this role

• Your internet speed and equipment setup

We hire for character, communication, and reliability first.

If you are motivated, professional, and ready to help grow a real business, apply today.

title: Inventory Planner
description:
Come join our team to help us create better SKU-driven inventory demand forecast that best predicts future sales trends and maintains in-stock inventory. In this role, you would be responsible for solving the ongoing puzzle of ensuring our global supply chain is well stocked with profitable items that well serve evolving customer and industry trends. This position requires an individual who is a thoughtful, resourceful, positive communicator with a strong interest in data science and always-evolving analytics that also enjoys solving problems under his or her own initiative to help plan our global inventory needs.



Job Responsibilities:

> Utilize historical sales trend and weekly sell-thru reporting to develop and execute weekly demand planning for each of our global sales channels including brick-and-mortal retail, wholesale, and online eCommerce.

> Compile and review weekly reporting on sales performance and inventory distribution metrics.

Forecast and manage global inventory data to ensure all required stock level goals are regularly maintained.

> Manage excess & obsolete (E&O) inventory and propose action plans to mitigate risk, meet and exceed inventory health targets, and ensure maximum profitability.

> Analyze current warehouse capacity constraints and vendor order requirements such as lead-times and minimum order quantity to develop inventory purchasing forecasts.

> Assist the Accounting department with ongoing audits, inventory control, and reconciliations.

> Analyze performance of sales growth, eCommerce PPC campaigns, lead generation, and other advertising campaigns and suggest strategies for improvement based on your ongoing analysis of how these sales activities affect inventory sell-through and the global supply chain.

> Diagnose and assist with time sensitive issues relating to data errors and impact on sales trends.



Basic Requirements:

> Education: College degree in business, finance, data science, or related fields of study.

> At least 2 years experience in consumer goods demand planning or inventory/sales forecasting.

> Deep analytical skills and a strong problem-solving ability.

> Strong bias for action with ability to prioritize, multi-task, tenaciously follow-up, and meet > competing deadlines.

> Advanced skills in Microsoft Office including Excel (Advanced Formulas, Tables & Formatting, Conditional Formatting, Advanced Charting, Pivot tables & Pivot Reporting, VLOOKUP, etc).

> Excellent oral and written communication skills.

> Advanced analytical skills and attention to detail.



Accessory Power is a consumer electronics manufacturer dedicated to providing a diverse range of high quality products for over 30 years. We manufacture and market thousands of products under our four main brands: GOgroove® | ENHANCE® | ReVIVE® | USA Gear® along with a handful of other lines and various accessory products. We would love to grow together!

title: Senior SEO Specialist With Content Writing Experience
description:
**SEO Specialist & Content Writer – Part-Time | Sydney-Based Electrical & Security Company**



Hours: Part-Time

Schedule: Some overlap with Australian business hours preferred

Position Type: Long-term PT



**About Us**



Kmelectric is a growing electrical and security installation company based in Sydney, Australia. We have been serving the Sydney market for over 20 years and are expanding our digital presence to match our on-the-ground reputation.



We are looking for a talented, reliable, and experienced SEO Specialist and Content Writer to join our team on a part-time basis. You will be working across two websites — our existing Kmelectric website and a brand-new website currently under construction — helping us rank higher on Google, generate more leads, and grow both businesses through organic search.



This is a long-term part-time position for someone who is serious about their craft and wants to grow with a stable, established company.



**What You Will Be Doing**



• Manage SEO across two websites — our established Kmelectric site and a new site currently in development

• Write and develop content for the new website from the ground up as it is being built

• Implement on-page SEO improvements across all service pages on both sites

• Create and optimise location-specific suburb pages for local SEO

• Monitor keyword rankings and SEO performance across both sites using industry tools

• Manage and optimise our Google Business Profiles

• Build internal links and improve site structure across both websites

• Write and publish blog posts and website content regularly

• Assist with technical SEO recommendations

• Work directly with the business owner to improve lead generation through organic search



**What We Are Looking For**



Required:

• Solid understanding of SEO — especially Local SEO for service businesses

• Strong content writing skills in English — you will be writing content for a brand new website

• Experience with Google Search Console and Google Analytics

• Proven ability to optimise content and pages for search engine rankings

• Experience ranking service businesses in Google Maps / Local Pack

• Ability to manage SEO across multiple websites simultaneously

• Reliable internet connection

• Ability to meet weekly deadlines and work well within a team environment

• Ability to communicate regularly and reliably with the team



Preferred:

• Experience launching and optimising new websites from scratch

• Experience using AI tools to assist with content writing

• Experience with service-based businesses



**Why Join Kmelectric**



• Long-term, stable part-time position — not a short contract

• Work directly with the business owner — no corporate layers

• Opportunity to manage and grow SEO across two websites

• Be part of the launch of a brand new website from day one

• Consistent work with clear goals and measurable results

• A company that values your expertise and invests in long-term relationships



**How to Apply**



Please send your application and include all of the following — applications missing any of these details will not be considered:



1. A summary of your SEO experience

2. Examples of websites you have worked on (URLs preferred)

3. Results you have achieved — rankings improved, traffic growth, leads generated

4. Your monthly salary expectation (in USD or PHP)

5. Your favourite SEO tool and why you use it



We look forward to hearing from serious applicants only. If you have the skills and want a long-term home with a growing Australian company, we want to hear from you.

title: Senior Video Editor (PH Night Shift | Pacific Standard Time)
description:
Application Requirements:

1. Use at least 10AP for your application.

2. Include "Senior Video Editor Pro" in your subject line.



Note: Applications missing either requirement will not be considered.

_________________________________________________________



About Veritas Vans

Veritas Vans builds the most trusted accessories for Starlink Mini and Starlink Standard. Our mission is to give people the freedom to work, explore, and stay connected anywhere. From Baja coastlines to deep forest trails, our customers rely on our gear for capability, protection, and unlimited connection.



Your role is to help visually tell this story across all platforms.



Role Overview

We are hiring a Senior Video Editor who can own our long-form YouTube content, high-retention short-form content, and graphic design needs. You must be highly experienced, creative, fast, and able to work autonomously within a growing brand.



Responsibilities



Video Editing – Long Form

- Edit 6–15 minute YouTube videos with strong retention, pacing, and narrative clarity.

- Add b-roll, overlays, captions, music, and brand-consistent graphics.

- Build engaging openings with proven YouTube hook methods.



Video Editing – Short Form

- Execute the Hook ? Retain ? Reward method for Reels, TikTok, and Shorts.

- Add dynamic subtitles, zooms, cuts, 
 inserts, and pacing adjustments.

- Produce scroll-stopping, high-retention content.



Graphic Design & Photo Editing

- Create YouTube thumbnails and graphic assets.

- Design text treatments, overlays, and promotional visuals.

- Edit lifestyle and product photos for multi-platform use.



Brand Storytelling

- Align all edits with our brand themes: freedom, connection, capability, control.

- Contribute creative ideas and concepts for future video content.



AI-Driven Editing & Workflow Optimization

- Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Adobe AI, Topaz, Descript, etc.) as a core part of your editing workflow.

- Generate high-performing hooks, captions, and on-screen text callouts using AI.

- Use AI to research and improve storytelling, pacing, and content structure.

- Continuously explore and implement new AI workflows to improve output quality, speed, and efficiency.

- Leverage AI to enhance both creative output and production throughput, not just assist basic tasks.



Cross-Platform Optimization

- Edit in multiple aspect ratios: 16:9, 9:16, 4:5, 1:1.

- Prepare final deliverables in organized, structured folders.

- Optimize content for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok,
.



Collaboration

- Work closely with the content team and leadership.

- Follow SOPs and meet deadlines consistently.

- Join scheduled calls proactively (no reminders required)

- Be punctual and prepared for feedback sessions



Work Discipline & Delivery Standards

- Be actively available and responsive during working hours (PST schedule).

- Address tasks, revisions, and team communication within working hours.

- Meet deadlines consistently and communicate early if delays occur.

- Submit deliverables early in the workday whenever possible to allow time for review and revisions.



Quality & Output Standards

- Deliver edits that are near publish-ready on first submission.

- Ensure drafts require minimal revisions and are not incomplete or partially executed.

- Perform a full self-review before submission to ensure:

- all feedback is applied

- no new issues are introduced

- output meets brand and quality standards

- Maintain consistently high production quality across all deliverables.



Note:

Include the phrase “Senior Video Editor Pro” in your subject line. Applications missing this phrase will not be considered. Use at least 5AP for your application.



Required Skills



- Ability to work graveyard shift (PST hours)

- 3–5+ years professional video editing experience

- Expert in Adobe Premiere Pro

- Strong skills in After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator, or Figma

- Proven experience editing YouTube content and high-performing short-form videos

- Strong understanding of retention, pacing, story structure, and attention engineering

- Experience creating high-converting thumbnails

- Strong understanding of modern content trends across YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok

- Ability to edit lifestyle, outdoor, product, and UGC-style content



AI & Workflow Skills (Required)

- Strong proficiency in using AI tools (ChatGPT, Adobe AI, etc.) within editing workflows

- Ability to generate hooks, captions, and on-screen text using AI

- Experience using AI to improve storytelling, pacing, and video performance

- Ability to research and implement new AI workflows to improve efficiency and output quality



Work Ethic & Discipline

- Highly reliable, responsive, and accountable

- Strong attention to detail and ability to self-review work

- Ability to follow feedback precisely and minimize repeated revisions



Bonus Experience

- Motion graphics or animation skills.

- Experience in e-commerce, outdoor brands, or creator channels.

- Understanding of YouTube SEO (titles, thumbnails, keywords).

- Ability to generate ideas for hooks, storylines, and visual treatments.



What We Offer

- Long-term employment with growth potential.

- Competitive salary based on experience.

- Consistent weekly workload.

- Direct impact on a fast-scaling global brand.

- Creative freedom and an opportunity to lead our video direction.



How to Apply



Submit the following:

- Resume

- Short explanation of why you’re the right fit

- Brief explanation of how you use AI in your editing workflow

- 1 example where you improved video performance (retention, CTR, etc.)

- Portfolio of your best long-form and short-form edits

- Links to YouTube channels or brands you’ve edited for



Learn About Us:









Website:

title: Geologist / Geological Engineer
description:
GEOLOGIST / GEOLOGICAL ENGINEER (OFF-SITE / REMOTE)

(ca. 32-40 hrs/week)



Geoprofile Ltd. is a small and fast-growing geotechnical company, operating in Switzerland, Liechtenstein and near-border zones of surrounding countries. We provide information about the subsoil and develop solutions for various geotechnical problems. We focus on the design, dimensioning and control of shallow and deep foundations, and construction pit excavations.

We are currently seeking a motivated and proactive Geologist / Geological Engineer to join our team in a fully remote position. In this role, you will support our ground investigation team in data processing, analysis, and interpretation. 



Your tasks include:

- Data processing and interpretation of cone penetration test (CPT) and dynamic probing (DPSH) results, primarily using Excel, with future development toward programming-based workflows (Python)

- Data quality control (data error detection, monitoring of zero values and calibration files, verification of field-measured coordinates)

- Daily coordination with other remote team members and project managers via Teams for task assignment and feedback

- Quarterly preparation of project statistics (project costs and field team efficiency)



Your profile:

- Degree in Earth Sciences, Geology, or Geological Engineering

- Preferably experience with loose (unconsolidated) soils, soil mechanics, geomorphology, and

sedimentology

- Strong command of English (written and spoken)

- Experience with CPT and DPSH data interpretation is an advantage (training will be provided)

- Experience in programming, coding, or scripting (preferably Python) is highly valued

- Strong motivation to further develop programming skills

- Ability to work independently, manage your own schedule, and prioritize tasks reliably



What we offer:

We value long-term collaboration built on trust, reliability, and professional growth. You will work independently within clearly defined priorities while being part of a supportive and experienced international team. We offer flexibility, structured onboarding, and opportunities to develop technical and programming expertise. If you are interested in this position, please reply so that we can get to meet each other. We are looking forward to welcoming you as part of our team!

title: Senior Geologist Consultant
description:
QUALIFICATIONS:

-Bachelor’s degree in Geology, Earth Sciences, or related field (Master’s or PhD preferred).

-Professional licensure as a Geologist or equivalent certification preferred.

-Minimum 15 years of experience in exploration, resource evaluation, and consulting for Ni-Cu-Au deposits.

-Proven track record in sulfide and laterite Ni-Cu-Au systems, including orebody modeling, resource estimation, and feasibility studies.

-Extensive experience in seasonal and remote field operations, managing multi-site campaigns.

-Advanced knowledge of magmatic and hydrothermal Ni-Cu-Au sulfide systems.

-Proficient in geological mapping, structural interpretation, core logging, sampling, and drilling techniques specific to Ni-Cu-Au deposits.

-Skilled in geostatistics, resource modeling, and industry software (Surpac, Datamine, Leapfrog, Vulcan, ArcGIS).

-Familiarity with JORC, NI 43-101, and PERC reporting standards.

-Strong understanding of geochemistry, petrology, mineralogy, and metallurgical characteristics of Ni-Cu-Au ores.

-Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and decision-making skills.

-Strong communication skills for presenting technical findings, resource reports, and exploration strategies to management, investors, and regulatory authorities.

-Leadership and mentoring abilities for junior geologists and seasonal field teams.

-Flexible and adaptable for seasonal work in remote or challenging terrains.

-Fluent in Mandarin (speaking and reading) to coordinate with stakeholders, contractors, or investors.



DUTIES & RESPONSIBILITIES:

-Lead and execute targeted exploration campaigns for Ni-Cu-Au sulfide and laterite deposits during seasonal fieldwork.

-Supervise and coordinate geological mapping, core logging, channel sampling, and drill programs specific to Ni-Cu-Au systems.

-Analyze lithological, structural, geochemical, and geophysical datasets to identify prospective Ni-Cu-Au mineralization zones.

-Conduct orebody modeling, resource estimation, and grade distribution analysis for Ni-Cu-Au deposits using software such as Surpac, Datamine, Leapfrog, or Vulcan.

-Prepare JORC, NI 43-101, or PERC-compliant technical reports including Mineral Resource and Reserve estimates for Ni-Cu-Au projects.

-Provide guidance on magmatic and hydrothermal Ni-Cu-Au sulfide systems, including identification of feeder zones, sulfide-rich horizons, and mineral paragenesis.

-Evaluate drill core, channel samples, and geochemical assays to refine deposit models and prioritize exploration targets.

-Oversee seasonal field teams in remote and challenging terrains, ensuring proper sampling protocols and QA/QC procedures for Ni-Cu-Au exploration.

-Advise management on exploration strategies, risk assessment, and project economics specific to Ni-Cu-Au mineralization styles.

-Collaborate with mining engineers, metallurgists, and environmental specialists to integrate geological models with mining feasibility and processing considerations.

-Ensure all field operations adhere to environmental, health, and safety regulations, including safe handling of sulfide-rich materials.

-Present technical findings, resource models, and exploration results to stakeholders, investors, and regulatory authorities.

-Mentor junior and seasonal geologists in geological mapping, sampling, modeling, and interpretation techniques for Ni-Cu-Au deposits.

-Recommend innovative geochemical, geophysical, and remote sensing methods to optimize Ni-Cu-Au exploration efficiency.

-Continuously monitor advances in Ni-Cu-Au deposit modeling, mineralogy, and metallurgical characteristics for potential application in exploration programs.
