title: Outreach Specialist/Personal VA
description:
[GAMES INDUSTRY]



Outreach Specialist / Virtual Assistant

Type: Full-time, Remote

Compensation: $500/mo base + commission on closed deals (No cap, earn up to $
/mo) 

*You do not need to do any sales related task, so no calls, no proposals , just outreach messages*

Based on historical data, getting minimum $1000-$2000 is not an issue if your KPIs are met



Note: This is a dedicated, full-time role. I'm looking for someone who will commit 100% to this position — no other clients or jobs on the side.



What I Do

I run business development for a mission-based user acquisition platform for games. We help game studios drive installs, retention, and in-game progression through missions and rewards — 50M+ gamers, 65% lower CPAs vs. Meta/Google. I own the full sales cycle from prospecting to close.



What I Need

I need a VA to handle my outbound outreach execution. I'll give you the lead lists and the templates. Your job is to personalize, send, follow up, and get prospects on my calendar.



What You'll Do



Cold Outreach (70%)

Send personalized cold
s and LinkedIn messages to game studios and publishers using approved templates and sequences

Customize each touchpoint with prospect-specific hooks provided in the lead list (game title, platform, UA pain point)

Execute multi-step cadences across
 and LinkedIn — 5–7 touches per prospect, spaced correctly

A/B test subject lines, openers, and CTAs as I direct

Hit daily/weekly send volume targets consistently



Follow-Up & Booking (20%)

Respond to replies — answer basic questions, handle objections using talk tracks, and send my Calendly link to book calls

Chase interested prospects until they're on the calendar

Re-engage cold or ghosted prospects with fresh angles on a set schedule



Reporting & Feedback (10%)

Track open rates, reply rates, and meetings booked per sequence

Flag what's working and what's not — subject lines, messaging angles, prospect segments

Share weekly outreach performance numbers with me



You're a Great Fit If You Have

You play games and understand the game ecosystem (Steam, mobile, web3)

1+ years doing cold outreach, appointment setting, or SDR work

Experience with outreach tools (Instantly, Lemlist, Apollo, Smartlead, or similar)

Strong written English — you can personalize a template without it reading like a mail merge

Discipline to hit daily send targets without supervision

Quick response time — you don't let warm replies sit for hours



Bonus Points

Familiarity with LinkedIn Sales Navigator

Experience in gaming, adtech, or performance marketing outreach

You've booked meetings for a B2B sales team before



What Success Looks Like

Month 1–2: Fully trained on messaging, ICP, and sequences. Hitting daily send targets, running cadences independently, and consistently booking qualified meetings.

Month 3: My calendar is packed with qualified calls because of you. Outreach is a machine.



How to Apply

Send your resume and a short note (3–4 sentences) if interested!

title: Lead Generation & Appointment Setting — $4/hr + Bonuses — CloseControl
description:
About CloseControl



CloseControl builds virtual receptionists for service businesses across the United States. We work with plumbers, HVAC companies, electricians, roofers, landscapers, cleaners, and other service businesses that rely on phone calls for customers. Our job is to make sure they never miss another call.



The Role



Your job is simple: get service business owners booked on a 15-minute call with our specialist.

How you get there is up to you. Cold calls, warm follow-ups, callbacks, voi
s,
s, LinkedIn messages, SMS — whatever professional approach you believe will get the appointment booked. We're not looking for someone who just dials a list and checks a box. We want someone who thinks independently, adjusts when something isn't working, and takes full ownership of their results.

If a prospect says "call me next week," you follow up without being told. If a certain approach isn't converting, you switch it up. If you spot a better way to get in front of business owners, you bring it to the table.

What matters is appointments that show up — not just activity for the sake of activity.



What You'll Do Every Day



Conduct 80+ outreach attempts per day (calls, follow-ups,
s, messages — whatever works)

Identify and contact service business owners who could benefit from our service

Book qualified prospects on a 15-minute call with our specialist

Follow up with prospects who showed interest but didn't book on the first contact

Log every outreach attempt in a shared Google Sheet in real time

Book all confirmed appointments in a shared Google Calendar immediately

Send confirmation reminders to booked prospects

Track your own performance and adjust your approach based on what's working

Submit weekly reports and call recordings every Friday





Compensation



Base pay: $4/hour

$3 bonus for every appointment that shows up

$150 monthly bonus if you hit 35+ confirmed appointments in a calendar month

Base pay raise to $4.50/hour after 3 consecutive months of hitting 35+ appointments

Base pay raise to $5/hour after 6 consecutive months of hitting 35+ appointments

Paid weekly, every Friday





Requirements



Real outbound cold calling or appointment setting experience (not just chat,
, or DMs — you need to be comfortable picking up the phone)

Professional English that American business owners can easily understand

Reliable internet connection with a backup plan for outages

Quiet workspace with no background noise

Comfortable working US business hours long-term (9pm–5am Philippines time)

Familiar with Google Sheets, Google Calendar, and basic CRM tools

Self-motivated — you don't wait to be told what to do, you figure it out





What We're NOT Looking For



Script readers who just dial and hang up

People who need to be micromanaged or reminded to follow up

Applicants currently working another full-time job

Generalists who list 20 skills and specialize in none





To Apply

Send a message that includes:



A short video or voice recording introducing yourself (so we can hear how you sound)

Your resume or a summary of your outbound calling experience

title: Call Center Quality Control Manager
description:
Dialer Quality Control & Performance Manager

We are seeking a highly organized, numbers-driven, and accountable Dialer Quality Control & Performance Manager to oversee daily dialer activity, call performance, and KPI compliance for our Follow Up Specialist team. This role is responsible for monitoring talk time, dial volume, call quality, pacing throughout the day, and ensuring tea
mbers are meeting company standards.



This person will play a critical role in maintaining productivity, enforcing accountability, identifying underperformance early, and helping improve call execution through live monitoring, reporting, and coaching support.



The ideal candidate is disciplined, detail-oriented, assertive, and experienced in managing outbound call teams, dialer systems, and performance scoreboards in a high-volume sales environment.



Key Responsibilities

Monitor daily performance of Follow Up Specialists and outbound callers

Track and report KPI performance including:

daily dial count

talk time

pass-offs

call connection quality

pacing throughout the day

Manage real-time checkpoint reporting during shift hours

Flag underperformers early and notify management before end of day

Ensure reps are on pace with company standards throughout the shift

Review dialer activity and identify gaps in productivity, urgency, and consistency

Monitor adherence to schedule, phone time, and work discipline

Pull and review call recordings for coaching and quality control purposes

Identify whether performance issues are caused by:

lack of activity

poor phone skill

low urgency

poor call handling

dialer inefficiencies

Prepare daily, weekly, and monthly performance reports

Maintain live scoreboards and performance dashboards

Work directly with leadership to enforce accountability standards

Assist with warning documentation, performance tracking, and improvement plans

Provide coaching feedback on call quality, script adherence, opener strength, objection handling, and call control

Help optimize workflows related to dialing, follow-up, and same-day lead handling

Ensure the team is following internal SOPs and production expectations

Core KPIs This Role Will Oversee

300 dials per rep per day minimum

3 hours talk time per rep per day minimum

Hourly checkpoint pacing

EOD performance reporting

Pass-off tracking

Underperformance escalation and documentation

Rep consistency across multiple days and weeks

Qualifications

Experience managing or monitoring outbound call center, sales, or appointment-setting teams

Experience with dialer systems and outbound call workflows

Strong understanding of productivity KPIs such as talk time, dial count, connect rate, and conversion pacing

Ability to read performance data quickly and take action in real time

Strong reporting, spreadsheet, and scorecard management skills

Comfortable giving direct feedback and holding people accountable

Strong communication and organizational skills

High attention to detail

Able to identify patterns in individual and team performance

Experience listening to recorded calls and giving constructive feedback

Strong sense of urgency and follow-through

Preferred Qualifications

Experience in real estate acquisitions, follow-up, inside sales, or lead generation environments

Experience using CRM and sales tracking platforms

Experience building KPI dashboards and accountability systems

Experience with performance improvement plans and call coaching

Bilingual is a plus, but not required

Ideal Traits

Assertive but professional

Highly disciplined

Data-driven

Process-oriented

Strong follow-up habits

Calm under pressure

Excellent at spotting inefficiency and weak execution

Not afraid to enforce standards

Work Schedule

Full-time

Must be available during team operating hours

Preferred schedule aligned with 10:00 AM to 8:00 PM EST production window

What Success Looks Like in This Role

Underperformance is identified before EOD, not after

Team pacing improves throughout the day

Fewer reps miss dial and talk time KPIs

Call quality issues are spotted and corrected faster

Leadership has clear daily visibility into team performance

Accountability is structured, consistent, and measurable

Compensation



Compensation will depend on experience and qualifications.

Can be structured as:



base salary

base + performance bonus

base + KPI bonus tied to team production and compliance

title: Outbound SDR
description:
VentureX is a New Zealand-based offshore recruitment and project delivery company that helps Kiwi businesses build dedicated teams in the Philippines. We place talent across sales, operations, tech, and support with a direct-hire model that keeps things transparent, fair, and built for the long term. We are not a BPO. The people we place work exclusively for one business, operate like part of an in-house team, and are treated that way.



We are currently hiring an SDR on behalf of one of our clients, a fast-growing New Zealand AI company that builds intelligent voice and chat agents for businesses across industries. Their product replaces expensive, time-limited customer service staff with AI that handles calls, books appointments, and follows up automatically, 24/7. The value proposition is strong, and the market is hot. 



Your job is to get the right people on the phone so our NZ-based closers can do their thing.



What you will be doing:



Running multichannel outreach every day across
, LinkedIn, and direct messaging, following a proven system we provide. Scripts, sequences, targeting criteria, and tools are already set up. You execute consistently, track your numbers, and book qualified discovery calls for our closing team in New Zealand.



What we are looking for:



You have done outbound SDR or appointment setting work before, and you can prove it. You are comfortable with cold outreach, and you do not fold after the first no. Your written English is clear, professional, and natural. You are organised, self-managed, and you own your results. You are available to work New Zealand business hours or close to them. You are coachable and process-driven.



There are multiple roles available

title: Marketing Assistant
description:
I. Basic Job Information



1. Job Title: Marketing Assistant



2. Department: Marketing Department



3. Reporting to: Marketing Manager/Marketing Director



4. Work Location: [Work from Home]



5. Job Type: Part-time



6. Posting Date: April 15, 2026



II. Job Responsibilities



1. Marketing Support - Assist the marketing team in developing and executing online and offline marketing campaigns, including campaign planning, material preparation, on-site execution, and post-campaign review, ensuring campaigns are implemented as planned and achieve their goals.



- Organize and archive marketing data (such as campaign participation, conversion rate, campaign performance, etc.), and regularly generate data reports to support marketing decisions.



- Follow up on marketing project progress, coordinate cross-departmental resources such as design, operations, and sales, ensuring efficient information transmission and smooth task progress.



2. Content and Channel Management - Assist in writing marketing copy, WeChat official account articles, short video scripts, etc., and complete the initial draft of content in line with the brand's tone.



- Responsible for the daily operation of social media accounts (WeChat, Weibo, Douyin, Xiaohongshu, etc.), including content publishing, fan interaction, comment replying, etc., to improve account activity.



- Assist in market channel expansion and maintenance, connect with KOLs and media resources, follow up on cooperation processes, and organize cooperation ledgers.



3. Brand and Materials Management - Assist in the design and coordination of brand promotional materials, and follow up on the production, printing, and distribution of posters, flyers, product manuals, etc.



- Maintain brand visual guidelines and ensure that all marketing materials and promotional content conform to brand standards.



4. Market Research and Competitive Analysis - Collect industry trends and competitor information (product strategies, marketing activities, pricing systems, etc.), and compile them into market research reports.



- Assist in analyzing changes in target user needs and behaviors to provide a reference for market strategy adjustments.



5. Administrative and Daily Support - Responsible for the daily administrative affairs of the marketing department, such as meeting organization, document receipt and dispatch, and office supplies procurement and management.



- Assist in handling basic financial and administrative work such as marketing department expense reimbursement and contract organization.



- Complete other market-related auxiliary tasks assigned by superiors.



III. Job Requirements



1. Education and Major: Associate's degree or above, with preference given to candidates majoring in Marketing, Advertising, Communication, Chinese Language and Literature, or Design.



2. Experience Requirements: - Fresh graduates or those with 1-2 years of market-related work experience are preferred; experience in marketing campaign execution or new media operations is a plus.



- Proficient in basic office software (Word, Excel, PPT), and able to use Excel proficiently for data organization and basic analysis.



3. Skills Requirements: - Excellent written communication skills, able to independently complete initial drafts of copy and compile data reports.



- Basic knowledge of new media operations, understanding of the operational rules and promotion techniques of platforms such as WeChat and Douyin.



- Detail-oriented, responsible, with excellent communication and coordination skills and a strong team spirit.



- Strong learning ability and resilience under pressure, able to adapt to a fast-paced marketing work environment.



4. Other Requirements: Passionate about the marketing industry, possessing good aesthetic sense, creative thinking, and brand awareness are preferred. IV. Salary and Benefits



1. Salary Range: [500-1000 RMB/month]

clean talking head edits

subtle zooms and pacing

simple cutaway visuals

light animation (not full cartoons)

You will be given:



a 45–75 second video clip

a short script



Your job is to:



edit pacing and cuts

add zooms where appropriate

include simple visual cutaways (images or basic motion)

IMPORTANT (Read Carefully)



This is NOT a flashy editing job.



I am specifically looking for:



strong sense of timing

ability to let moments breathe

restraint (not over-editing)



No:

excessive zooms

meme edits

over-the-top transitions

Style



Dry, observational humour

Subtle, slightly awkward tone



Think:

natural pacing, not high-energy YouTube editing



Budget

$20–30 AUD for this trial

1–2 examples of your work

You have a clip where the speaker finishes a sentence and there is a 2-second silence before the next line.

Monitor and manage community interactions, including handling concerns or negative comments

Coordinate with the team on promotions, posts, and announcements



Requirements:



Experience managing
 pages for ecommerce brands

Strong written English with a natural, conversational tone

Ability to handle high volume of comments and messages

Good judgment when responding publicly vs privately

Organized and responsive



Nice to Have:



Experience with ecommerce brands or direct-to-consumer products

Familiarity with handling customer service through >
ments and DMs

Experience engaging with UGC or community-driven content



If you’re someone who enjoys engaging with people online and can represent a brand confidently, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Video Editor (Premiere Pro + After Effects | Captions + Motion | Full-Time Remote)
description:
'm looking for a dedicated, detail-oriented video editor to join De Videofabriek — a Dutch video production company — as a long-term, full-time team member.



This is not just an editing role. You'll be working closely with me on a wide range of video content: client deliverables, Instagram/LinkedIn content, and multi-format exports. You'll be involved in the process, not just handed files.



**What you'll do:**



- Edit videos based on a structured proxy workflow

- Add captions (accurate timing, clean styling) and motion graphics/animations

- Export multiple formats per project efficiently

- When no edit jobs are queued: help build and optimize templates, workflows, and systems in Premiere Pro, After Effects, and Notion

- Communicate clearly despite a language difference — most content is in Dutch and English; scripts and SRTs are always provided, and I'll brief you thoroughly on context



**What I'm looking for:**



- Strong Premiere Pro skills — fast, clean, organized

- Basic After Effects knowledge is preferred

- Experience with captions (not just auto-generated — properly timed, styled and animated)

- Comfortable working in Notion for task and project management

- Proactive, reliable, and communicative — someone who thinks along, not just executes

- Available during most of the overlapping hours, proactive and independent in other hours

- Can handle Dutch captions and subtitles without understanding the language (scripts + briefings always provided in English)



**Nice to have:**



- Experience with proxy workflows

- Familiarity with Instagram and LinkedIn-style short-form video. YouTube is a plus

- Understanding of Dutch (not required, but a big plus)



**What we offer:**



- Full-time remote position (~40 hrs/week)

- €750/month (long-term, stable work)

- Close collaboration — you won't be left in the dark

- Room to grow as systems and workload scale



**How to apply:**



Send a short message explaining your editing background + 2-3 examples of work that show captions and/or motion graphics. Bonus: tell me one thing you'd check to improve in a typical editing workflow.

title: Executive Operations VA (Sales, Client Support & Marketing) – Credit Repair Business
description:
We are a fast-growing credit repair and business funding company looking for a highly organized, proactive, and results-driven Virtual Assistant to help manage daily operations.



This is NOT a basic admin role.



You will be responsible for:



Client communication

Lead follow-up and sales

Onboarding

Payment tracking

Content creation and posting



???? Your role is to help remove the CEO from daily tasks and keep the business running smoothly.



???? Responsibilities

???? Client Communication

Respond to all client
s, texts, and messages

Answer general questions and provide updates

Maintain a professional and timely response (within 2–4 hours)

???? Client Onboarding

Send intake forms

Collect required documents

Ensure contracts are signed before starting

Move clients into active workflow

???? Dispute Coordination Support

Receive updates from the dispute team

Pull client progress reports when notified

Communicate updates to clients

Flag any issues that need attention

???? Scheduling

Schedule client progress review calls

Coordinate based on report availability

???? Lead Follow-Up & Sales

Respond to new leads within 5–15 minutes

Follow up consistently (Day 1, 2, 3, 5, 7)

Answer pre-sale questions

Guide leads toward signup/payment

Convert leads into paying clients

???? Payment Management

Send payment links

Track all payments

Follow up on overdue payments within 24 hours

???? Content & Marketing

Create and post content regularly

Repurpose existing content (posts, reels, captions)

Respond to comments and inbound messages

Help generate leads through engagement

???? Weekly Reporting



Provide a weekly summary including:



New leads

Conversions (sales)

Active clients

Payments collected

Any issues needing attention

???? KPIs (Performance Expectations)

Lead response time: Under 15 minutes

Client response time: Under 4 hours

Lead conversion rate: 20–30%+

Payment collection rate: 95%+

Follow-up completion: 100% (no missed leads)

Content consistency: Daily or as assigned

???? Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who is:



Highly organized and detail-oriented

Strong communicator (written and verbal)

Proactive (doesn’t wait to be told what to do)

Sales-minded (comfortable converting leads)

Reliable and consistent

Able to follow systems and processes



Experience in credit repair, sales, or customer service is a plus but not required.



???? 30-Day Growth Plan



Week 1: Learn systems, scripts, and processes

Week 2: Begin handling leads and onboarding

Week 3: Take full control of communication and follow-ups

Week 4: Operate independently and optimize performance



???? Important



This role directly impacts business revenue.



We are not just looking for a VA — we are looking for someone who can:

???? Help us grow

???? Convert leads

???? Keep operations smooth



???? Compensation

Base pay + performance incentives (based on conversions and results)

Opportunity for long-term growth

???? To Apply



Please include:



Your experience with sales, client communication, or VA work

Your availability and time zone

Examples of messages or sales conversations you’ve handled (if available)

Why you would be a good fit for this role

???? Final Note



We are building a strong team and looking for someone who wants to grow with us long-term.



If you are organized, motivated, and ready to take ownership — we want to work with you.

title: VA - GUEST COMMUNICATION - AIRBNB
description:
We are INDIGO PROPERTIES, a boutique-style vacation rental management company on the lookout for a virtual assistant to join our growing family in Conway, NH.

Please e mail us directly



Key Responsibilities:

*Guest Communication: Respond promptly and professionally to guest inquiries and concerns via Airbnb, direct booking platforms, and other channels.

*Issue Resolution: Troubleshoot guest issues, coordinate with internal team members, and ensure timely resolutions.

*Task Oversight: Monitor cleaning/maintenance schedules, log last-minute updates, and clearly communicate changes to the team.

*Documentation & Tracking:

*Maintain up-to-date spreadsheets, logs, and FAQs under manager guidance.

*Track changes such as refunds, relocations, or schedule shifts.

*Voice Note Transcription: Accurately transcribe
 drafts and task notes from manager voice recordings.

Required Qualifications:

*Strong English communication skills (both verbal and written)

*Highly organized, responsive, and able to work independently

Preferred Qualifications:

title: Remote Virtual Assistant (Fast-Paced E-commerce Order Processing + Commission)
description:
I run a high-volume e-commerce operation and need extremely responsive Virtual Assistants to place orders quickly and accurately from online retailers.



This is NOT a slow or passive role. You will be actively placing orders, communicating in real-time, and keeping up with a fast workflow.



If you are slow to respond, miss details, or disappear during work hours — this will not work.



What You’ll Do:



Place orders from online websites based on provided instructions

Follow exact ordering SOPs (payment methods, addresses, etc.)

Communicate quickly via chat throughout shifts

Track and confirm orders

Flag any issues immediately (out of stock, pricing changes, etc.)



Compensation:



Commission-based role

Typical earnings: $400–$600/month (can scale higher with performance)

Opportunity to increase workload and earnings if you perform well



Requirements:



FAST communication (you reply within minutes, not hours)

Reliable internet + computer

Ability to follow instructions exactly

Available during agreed working hours (no disappearing mid-shift)

Experience with online ordering / e-commerce is a plus



This role is performance-based.

If you are efficient and responsive, you will earn more and get more work.



IMPORTANT – FILTER QUESTIONS (must answer or you will be ignored):



What is your average response time during working hours? (be honest)

If I send you a message while you're working, how quickly will you reply?

Describe your experience placing orders online (what websites / platforms?)

If an item goes out of stock while placing an order, what do you do?

What hours are you available daily? Include your time zone

Type this EXACT phrase at the top of your application:

"READY TO WORK – FAST VA"

title: Marketing Assistant (Remote, Australian Hours)
description:
The basics



Permanent full-time, immediate start

$10-12 AUD per hour (based on experience)

10am to 6pm AEST, Monday to Friday (7 paid hours plus 1 hour unpaid lunch)

Fully remote, working alongside an Australian team



About Dale Carnegie



Dale Carnegie is a global training organisation. The founder wrote How to Win Friends and Influence People, and for over a century we've helped people and teams build communication, leadership, and sales capability. We're ranked among the top 20 leadership development companies globally.



In Australia, we run open enrolment training courses and work with some of the country's largest organisations on leadership development, sales capability, and culture change. The marketing team is small, fast-moving, and focused on doing good work.



The role



The Marketing Assistant supports the Marketing Manager across campaigns, content, and digital channels. It's hands-on, with real ownership of the day-to-day execution, not a research-only seat.



What the role covers:



Helping plan and run marketing campaigns end to end

Updating and creating website content

Planning and executing regular
 campaigns (with the help of a Claude AI agent) that engage and nurture our audience 

Managing social media across Instagram,
, and LinkedIn

Briefing and coordinating with the graphic designer. Design work sits with the designer, so this role is about clear briefs, timelines, and feedback.

Project work as directed by the Marketing Manager



What we're looking for



Must have:

Strong, clear, professional written and verbal English. This one matters. The role involves daily writing across website copy,
s, and social, plus regular communication with the Australian team.

Previous experience in a marketing assistant or similar role

Working knowledge of the Microsoft Office Suite

Experience with CRM and CMS systems. Salesforce and/or Salesforce Marketing Cloud is a real advantage.

Keen eye for detail

Able to juggle competing priorities and hit deadlines

Self-managed and comfortable working in a fully remote setup



Nice to have:

Light design skills in Canva or Adobe Suite for small edits

Experience with social scheduling tools (Meta Business Suite, Hootsuite, Later)



Why it's worth applying



Permanent full-time role, not short-term contract work

Work directly with a supportive, collaborative marketing team

Real career development and professional training opportunities

Immediate start



How to apply



Send a short cover note along with a CV. In the cover note, a few sentences on:

- Why this role caught your interest

- A recent marketing project you have worked on and what the contribution and outcomes were

- Confirmation that the 10am to 6pm AEST schedule works
